programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: I Quit: Easier Said Than Done

programme.desc: A dockhand hopes his sea legs will keep him steady. A deputy sheriff lays down the law.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Safer at Home-stead
programme.desc: The Raney family turns cameras on themselves as they shelter in place on their Alaskan homestead. When a moose kill is discovered dangerously close to their cabin, Marty attempts to track the predators.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Cold Hard Lockdown

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Family Affair

programme.desc: Christy’s demanding law professor leans on her a little too hard for support, and Bonnie’s plan to trick Adam into choosing a wedding venue backfires.

programme.title: Mom: Big Sauce and Coconut Water
programme.desc: Christy is certain that Bonnie is in over her head when she invites a freshly paroled Tammy to stay with them.

programme.title: Mom: Flying Monkeys and a Tank of Nitrous

programme.title: George Lopez: Mementos
programme.desc: George receives a life altering phone call as he prepares to donate an organ to his dad.

programme.title: George Lopez: Why You Crying?
programme.desc: When Max starts acting out because of his learning disability, Benny decides to punish him.

programme.title: Full House: Crimes and Michelle's Demeanor
programme.desc: Jesse pawns his guitar to pay for an engagement ring for Rebecca; Michelle is a handful.

programme.title: Full House: The I.Q. Man

programme.title: Full House: Slumber Party
programme.desc: A mother/ daughter slumber party leaves Stephanie feeling left out until Joey rescues her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Secret Box/ Band Geeks
programme.desc: Pat won't show SpongeBob his secret box; Squid recruits a band to one-up a rival.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Boxed In
programme.desc: The Pan Global Games have arrived in Coral Harbor, but Ranger duties prevents the teens from attending any of the events.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Double Trouble

programme.desc: O.O.P.S.I., the new artificial intelligence running the Park, goes dangerously off the rails, while a thief posing as an intern steals two eggs that contain a new species of dinosaur inside.

programme.title: It's Pony: Loud Horse/ Sick Annie

programme.title: Movie: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: When the secret recipe for krabby patties goes missing, SpongeBob and the gang venture onto dry land to get it back. The scent leads them to a pirate with a magic book, and the ocean-dwellers must transform themselves into superheroes to take him down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Friends in Dry Places/ Coupe Dreams
programme.desc: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering. In order to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local rideshare driver.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort

programme.title: The Loud House: Snoop's On/ How Double Dare You
programme.desc: The siblings turn to Lisa's genius to help them land a spot on 'Double Dare.' After secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Atlantis SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a missing artifact from the lost city of Atlantis, he and his friends are invited to visit the magical city. Unfortunately, once there, Patrick accidentally bursts the world's oldest living bubble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom/ Welcome to the Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boss for a Day/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: D-Day

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Who's Flying

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Crisis in the Cockpit
programme.desc: Before 'Crew Resource Management,' the Captain was looked at quite highly and was not to be challenged, even if crew members felt he was wrong. But before the program was enacted, many planes crashed.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Small Planes, Big Problems
programme.desc: There is little room for mistakes in the cockpit of a small plane, where bad weather, poor visibility or distraction can be deadly.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Crop Circles and Second Suns

programme.title: Weird Earth: Ghost Ships and Blood Ice
programme.desc: A passenger on a helicopter films a weird red liquid seeping from an Antarctic glacier. A ship appears in the sky at the site of a notorious World War Two naval battle. And strange lights filmed dividing over an American city.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Strangest Places

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Rain
programme.desc: A look at how rain drops are formed.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Tides
programme.desc: An examination of tides including a look at the extreme tidal range of Canada's Bay of Fundy and the tidal bores of Alaska's Turnagain Arm.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Gravity
programme.desc: An examination of gravity includes a report on an anomaly in Canada's Hudson Bay and a look at how earthquakes affect Earth's gravitational pull.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Blizzards

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Gravity

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion: Icy Ending
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead behind the wheel of her SUV, it looks like she simply slid off the icy road. But when detectives canvass the scene, they notice something that says otherwise – a set of footprints in the snow, leading away from the crash.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion: Snow Shoes
programme.desc: When a high-school senior is found clinging to life, detectives have to act fast before the crime scene is covered in a blanket of snow. Their investigation shows they missed the assailant by mere minutes. Can they track him down, or were they too late?

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion: Puddle Proof

programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.desc: When a perverted arsonist strikes Tacoma, the TPD and the TFD must put aside their rivalries to solve the case. To everyone's surprise, the two crews discover they are not as different as they think. Unfortunately, the lovefest may not last.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Whodunit?

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Emotionally In-Vested
programme.desc: When Nanny frets about leaving Miley behind to go out of town Chase comes up with an idea to help out. Todd lands himself in trouble on a date with Julie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: White Nannies Can't Jump
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's podcasting career almost ends before it starts when Todd goes overboard with preparation. Meanwhile, Nanny Faye joins a senior basketball league.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Restaurant Impossible
programme.desc: Chase decides to start his own candle business and Julie finds that her dream of opening up her own restaurant clashes with Todd's vision.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Spoiled Sports
programme.desc: Todd gets roped into a boys trip to Universal Orlando for Grayson's birthday, and Julie teaches Chloe a lesson in sportsmanship before her first horse riding competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Perfect Equation
programme.desc: When Savannah brings home her new boyfriend Todd takes the opportunity to test his intentions. Chase and Savannah step up and help when Grayson struggles with a math test.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord of the Earrings
programme.desc: Todd tries to teach Julie a lesson about keeping track of her jewelry after she loses another expensive piece. Nanny Faye enlists Chase's help for a neighborhood porch competition.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Finale
programme.desc: For the four chefs in Guy Fieri's summer bash finale, a beach ball determines which aisles the chefs get to shop for their summertime guilty pleasure. Then, they find feature ingredients for their ultimate grilled feast in an epic scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bringing Comfort Home
programme.desc: On today's menu, there's gourmet grilled cheese from Nashville, primo pizza from Boulder, Colorado, Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Matters
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stepping into some family kitchens. In Vancouver, B.C., the Chinese joint hand-pulling noodles and using ages-old family recipes for dishes like beef rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Mozz to Matzo Balls
programme.desc: A 1920's candy and ice cream place that's added mozzarella sticks and rigatoni.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Family Style
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is taking a seat at some family restaurants. He stops at a sibling-run Vietnamese place in Utah serving authentic dishes using family recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unlikely Partners
programme.desc: Guy checks out some unique combos in Los Angeles and in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ and More
programme.desc: Green mesquite smoked classics in Austin; a railroad car turned BBQ shack in California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Just Like Yesterday
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits some joints that feel like they've been there forever. In San Diego, an overgrown coffee shop serving chicken and dumplings for 60 years; a bar-turned-restaurant in Chicago's Little Italy, and in Atlanta, a legendary diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Global Goodies
programme.desc: Guy takes a walk down memory lane to check on some of his favorite DDD finds. He gets a second helping at his first Peruvian place in Chicago. In Seattle, tradition stands firm at an old school chili parlor. Plus, local dives in Minneapolis and Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Funky Finds in 'da House
programme.desc: Guy and his son video chat with four DD alums that walk them through one of their recipes. The recipes include a funky waffle from Syracuse, gourmet mac 'n' cheese from Cleveland and California smoked turkey and green chile pork with an island twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: International Affair
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is circling the globe starting in Salt Lake City where a Vietnamese sandwich shop has exploded with six locations around town. In San Antonio, Texas, a Greek chef is whipping up real-deal Mexican for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Where's the Beef?
programme.desc: It's all about the beef on this trip as Guy Fieri pops into a classic diner in Marietta, Georgia, for a taste of what's topping the charts these days. Next, it's on to San Antonio where a carwash-laundromat-kitchen combo is crankin' out killer burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Layered, Stuffed and Stacked
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy on this trip, as Guy Fieri first stops in to see an old buddy in Kansas City, Mo., who's got new spots and a secret menu of sandwiches that are not so secret anymore.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pretzels, Pork and Paella
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into everything from pretzels to paella. In Bozeman, Mont., a five-star take on breakfast with a Mexican pork masterpiece and a French toast Monte Cristo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cultural Twist
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine with a twist! First, there's a cafe that's been serving scratch-made Scandinavian specialties in Salt Lake City since the 1950s. Next, there's a pizza joint putting an Indian spin on the classic Italian pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Biscuits, Bagels and BLTs
programme.desc: A breakfast joint in Portland where they make Buttermilk pancakes with sweet potato, and a diner in Anselmo, California that makes a BLT with soft-shelled Crab.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Italian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out classic Italian joints including a Baltimore deli making lasagna from scratch, a San Diego pizza joint where the dough is hand-tossed and a spaghetti house that's been cooking up classic family recipes for 60 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Something From Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers real deal dishes born elsewhere in Norwalk, CT, Minneapolis and Chicago.

programme.title: Giada in Italy: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: On Capri, Giada De Laurentiis makes a beautiful picnic to celebrate la dolce vita, or the sweet life, by the water with her daughter and mother. The menu features Amalfi lemon chicken, grilled plum and pistachio salad.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Updated Manhattan
programme.desc: Bobby Flay puts his brunch spin on classic NY staples with chef Scott Conant. They toast the town with a Manhattan and stack up an Everything Bagel Strata with Cream Cheese Custard and Smoked Salmon Relish.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Best in Class
programme.desc: Ina's sharing best in class dishes with the volume turned right up.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bayou Bash Brunch
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites Louisiana native and actress Faith Ford over for a brunch that makes them feel like they're in the Big Easy. Valerie makes green tomato Benedict and easy cajun hollandaise, olive salad, hurricane mimosas and bananas foster.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 12
programme.desc: Ladd drops by on Ree and the kids to see what's cooking. The Greek salad is roasted and her sesame noodles with mushrooms are stir-fried. Plus, Ree makes breaded buffalo fried mozzarella bites and creates a 'King of the Ranch' ice cream pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals: Italian
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a trio of marvelous 16-minute Italian meals. There's speedy pork scaloppini for a fast family dinner and snappy, saucy steak pizzaiola that the boys absolutely adore.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Kid-Approved
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing 100-percent kid-approved recipes that are all quick and easy to make. She starts with mini burgers and bite-sized fries for her fun waffle fry sliders, and the speedy 4-cheese pepperoni pizzadilla.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is exploring 16-minute marvels with four awesome weeknight dinners cooked against the clock. She makes pork schnitzel sandwiches topped with warm red cabbage followed by a snappy Italian sausage pasta skillet.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Campfire Cookout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting together some delicious campfire favourites and reliving her childhood by camping out in her backyard. Her husband Nick is building the fire, and they've invited some old camp buddies to join the fun.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Dinner and a Movie ... Outdoors
programme.desc: Valerie designs an Old Hollywood menu featuring brisket sliders with white barbecue sauce, horseradish potato salad and crunchy manchego.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Diner Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows diners, so when his chef friends come to the ranch with their version of diner classics, they bring their A-game.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Clambake on the Grill
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a summertime seafood meal that's all about the prep and then letting the foil and grill do the work. He makes foil packets of Clams with Sausage and Peppers and, for dessert, Peaches with Mascarpone and Honey.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts share the comfort food recipes that make them happy all summer long. Sunny Anderson has a spin on a favourite with citrus glazed can-grilled chicken.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cheesiest
programme.desc: Four cheese experts create their signature dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple G A La No Cart
programme.desc: Chefs make a Mediterranean feast using the least likely ingredients from the store's middle aisles. Next, they take a hands-on approach to gathering the items for a salad and sandwich without a shopping cart.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: High-Steak Hijinks
programme.desc: There's nothing comforting about making a comfort meal with five ingredients, but that's what the chefs have to do. Then, they must make an upscale dinner using a grocery list that includes ketchup and pretzels!

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Pencil Break
programme.desc: Follow Craig as he leads his best friends on comical journeys by their neighborhood creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Last Game of Summer
programme.desc: Follow Craig as he leads his best friends on comical journeys by their neighborhood creek.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Go with the Flow
programme.desc: Vic and Val get annoyed with Sal, but eventually realize how cool and magical he is.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: The Great Bongo Heist
programme.desc: The boys forget to get Chata a gift for Abuela Day and in a panicked move, they pretend that the bongo drums they borrowed from Xochi are for her.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Hero/ The Photo
programme.desc: Richard's feelings get hurt when he overhears Gumball and Darwin making fun of him. To rectify this, Gumball and Darwin try to prove that he is their hero. Gumball struggles to take a good school picture.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Recipe/ The Puppy
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin discover the secret behind Anton’s immortality; The kids finally get the puppy they always wanted, except it's actually a turtle.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Pizza Band
programme.desc: The Bears get pizza at Papa Bear’s Pizza Cave and wind up replacing the place’s animatronic band. They’re such a hit that they go on tour!

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Burrito
programme.desc: After a restaurant makes a bear-sized burrito, Grizz can't bring himself to eat such a work of art. He carries the burrito everywhere making it a new, and increasingly smelly, part of his life.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Wingmen
programme.desc: In order to get some sleep, the Bears help an annoying bird find a new mate.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Charlie
programme.desc: The Bears meet Charlie the Bigfoot when he signs up on a home-sharing website to spend a weekend with the Bears. Charlie is the worst possible houseguest for the Bears, and nearly destroys their house.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Showdown on King Kai's World! Goku vs. Beerus the Destroyer!
programme.desc: Beerus and Whis land on King Kai's planet and meet Goku, who has never heard of a "Super Saiyan God," but wants to spar with Beerus. Goku is easily beaten, and King Kai is left to warn Vegeta about who is coming to Earth.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Don't Anger the Destroyer! A Heart-Pounding Birthday Party
programme.desc: Vegeta is paralyzed by Beerus' presence on Earth, but Bulma doesn't quite share his senses and invites him and Whis to join her party. They adore Earth food, and Beerus is less than pleased when Buu eats all of the pudding.

programme.title: American Dad!: Old Stan in the Mountain
programme.desc: Stan is turned into a frail old man because of his enthusiastic hatred of old people. Roger takes Francine on a road trip to attend a dance competition.

programme.title: American Dad!: The Wrestler
programme.desc: When Barry threatens Stan's old high school wrestling record, Stan asks Roger to beat Barry and defend his small claim to fame.

programme.title: American Dad!: Dr. Klaustus
programme.desc: Roger acts as the Smith family's therapist under his 'Dr. Penguin' alter ego, but his services are put on hold when he is sent to Iraq to fight in the war.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Raising Gazorpazorp
programme.desc: Morty convinces Rick to buy him a sexy robot. Guess what tho? Trouble happens, dog.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Griffin Family History
programme.desc: When the Griffins get robbed, the family runs into Peter's panic room to escape the trespassers. Now isolated and trapped, Peter insists the family know about their ancestry and narrates a chain of events in world history that explains the Griffin name.

programme.title: Family Guy: Stewie B. Goode
programme.desc: After a competitive swim lesson, Stewie tries to destroy his rival by sabotaging a lifeguard stand.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Goku Must Pay: The Warrior of Justice Top Barges In
programme.desc: Insulted by Goku’s nonchalance regarding the Tournament of Power, a warrior from the 11th Universe challenges Goku to a battle for justice.

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind: Green Tea and Sanctuary, Part 2
programme.desc: Branching off from Bruno, who opts to tackle the underground swimmer Secco, Giorno and Mista chase Cioccolata as he flies to spread rotten ruin upon Rome. Their battles unfold in front of a mystery ally.

programme.title: Assassination Classroom: Assassination Time
programme.desc: A creature who blasted the moon into a crescent shows up at Kunugigaoka Junior High School, and he's giving the students a year to assassinate him.

programme.title: Black Clover
programme.desc: The devil Megicula is in the Spade Kingdom. Princess Lolopechka of the Heart Kingdom reveals what it will take to defeat him and lays out a deadline.

programme.title: Fire Force: We Are Family
programme.desc: A superhuman firefighter is created to handle supernatural fire incidents.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: Crescent Moon Night
programme.desc: Yugao is ordered by Sukui to track down the reanimated Hayate. Shaken by her lover’s unexpected return as an enemy, Yugao manages to catch up to Hayate and his men.

programme.title: Samurai Jack: XCVI
programme.desc: Samurai Jack fights to save a village from a horrible fate.

programme.title: Gemusetto Machu Picchu: Chapter 2B: Second Set
programme.desc: Makasu defeats religious pantheons in sports and steals their mystical artifacts.

programme.title: The Boondocks: Let's Nab Oprah
programme.desc: When Riley, Rummy, and some others set out to kidnap Oprah, Huey is forced to stop them.

programme.title: The Venture Brothers: Home Is Where the Hate Is
programme.desc: Dr. Venture receives an unorthodox introduction to his new Guild-assigned nemesis.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Talks You Back to Sleep
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera attempts to talk viewers back to sleep on a rainy night.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Reads You the Church Announcements
programme.desc: Joe Pera reads the announcements at church.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Lights Up the Night With You
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera attempts to present a spirited New Year’s Eve celebration to viewers as well as his neighbor’s five-year-old daughter, whom he is babysitting.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Talks to You About the Rat Wars of Alberta, Canada, 1950 - Present Day
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera and the school’s band teacher, Sarah Conner, put together a musical based on the Alberta Rat Control Program that has kept the Canadian province rat-free since 1950.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Ghostboy/ La Larva de Amor
programme.desc: While Starfire is away, Silkie wanders away to Mexico, where he shares romantic intrigue worthy of a telenovela with a dramatic Mexican beauty and her jealous lover.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: The Puppet Awesome Brawlers/ The Return of Sophie
programme.desc: The Awesome brawlers go to see Benton Dusk to tell him about the Fusion Bakugan and ask him if he knows anything about this character: Haavik. A video has surfaced showing Toshi using an illegal Baku-Brawling device.

programme.title: Ben 10: Tales from the Omnitrix
programme.desc: Ben Tennyson discovers a curious watch that allows him to transform into different aliens.

programme.title: Ben 10: Tim Buk-TV
programme.desc: The Tennyson family head to the Okefenokee Swamp to see the blooming of the Bushing Orchid, but the orchid may be in danger when Tim Buk-Tu decides to film his reality t.v show there.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Hey Pizza!/ Gorilla
programme.desc: Trying to score a free pizza, Cyborg and Beast Boy engage in a war of wits with a pesky delivery boy who can’t be stopped.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Girls' Night Out/ You're Fired
programme.desc: Beast Boy gets replaced by a pair of shape-shifting twins; Robin, Cyborg and Beast Boy won't let Starfire and Raven come along on their 'Boys Night Out,' the girls and Jinx have a wild night of their own.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Super Robin/ Tower Power
programme.desc: Robin convinces Raven to use her magic to give him powers; The team disassembles Cyborg when he shorts out and they forgot how to reassemble him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Parasite/ Starliar
programme.desc: When Starfire brings home a space parasite as a pet, the parasite wins the affection of everyone but Robin who is suspicious. Starfire tries to spare feelings by lying when she is the only one invited to the Titans East Annual Dance.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Meatball Party/ Staff Meeting
programme.desc: Raven eats a bad meatball that causes tentacles to spring from her teeth and devour the other Titans.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Terra-ized/ Artful Dodgers
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Ninjago: Ninjago Confidential
programme.desc: Soft after recent victory, the ninja are ill-prepared when a dangerous new enemy rises.

programme.title: Ninjago: The Prodigal Father
programme.desc: Soft after recent victory, the ninja are ill-prepared when a dangerous new enemy rises.

programme.title: Ninjago: The Temple of Madness
programme.desc: Soft after recent victory, the ninja are ill-prepared when a dangerous new enemy rises.

programme.title: Ninjago: Game Over
programme.desc: Soft after recent victory, the ninja are ill-prepared when a dangerous new enemy rises.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Limit/ The Game
programme.desc: Nicole becomes enraged at the grocery store when the kids won't stop asking for candy. The family must complete a game of Dodj or Daar to the end, or else.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Promise/ The Voice
programme.desc: After getting a threatening message of Elmore Plus, Gumball and Darwin go apologize to everyone they know. Darwin gets in trouble when he makes conflicting promises to Gumball and Banana Joe.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Boombox/ The Castle
programme.desc: When Mom is away, anything goes, and Dad's lack of rules soon attracts unwelcome houseguests.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Tape/ The Sweaters
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to make some amazing home movies. Gumball and Darwin's reputations are challenged by the new kid in school.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Internet/ The Plan
programme.desc: Gumball accidentally uploads a video of himself and then demands The Internet take it down... personally! AND The Watterson kids come up with a fool-proof plan to save their mom, but is it Gumball-proof?

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The World/ The Finale
programme.desc: A few skits about the life of the inanimate objects of Elmore. The Wattersons are flabbergasted to find out that their actions indeed have consequences.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Kids/ The Fan
programme.desc: Whilst Gumball and Darwin make fun of Mom and Dad for being old, their voices start to break. Gumball and Darwin decide to make the most of childhood while they still can.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Plus Kingdom
programme.desc: Follow Craig as he leads his best friends on comical journeys by their neighborhood creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Ice Pop Trio

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Principal Gallagher's Lesbian Lover
programme.desc: When Alan is called to meet with the school principal over a picture Jake drew of a large-breasted schoolmate, he calls Charlie to watch over Jake. When Charlie doesn't respond, Alan accuses him of 'not being there for him,' and Charlie relents.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Carpet Burns and a Bite Mark
programme.desc: Charlie organizes an intervention in order to keep Alan from reuniting with his ex-wife, Judith.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Young bongo Moti is in his prime and the keepers prepare him to mate. Aquarium staff grow concerned when they discover pinstripe damba fish George in distress, and silver gibbon Rayya mimics older brother Eko's every move.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Storm on the Horizon

programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Dysfunctional to Functional Kitchen
programme.desc: Christina returns to work after having her baby, but she may need help from her friends as she juggles a newborn and tackles her new clients' home. The couple wants a bright kitchen with a modern-farmhouse design and a layout that opens up their space.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Wellness Remodel
programme.desc: Christina helps her good friend and business partner, Cara, and her husband remodel their main bedroom and bath. When the couple can't see eye-to-eye on design and unexpected costs begin to mount, Christina faces pressure to make both of them happy.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Bold Kitchen for a Brit
programme.desc: A British ex-pat and his wife decide to renovate their outdated kitchen. Christina designs a modern-Craftsman look for the space, but getting all of the elements to match becomes a huge challenge.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: A Clash of Style

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Italianate Charm

programme.title: Home Town: A Southern Dream

programme.title: Home Town: The Littlest House
programme.desc: A business owner that's been living with her mom is ready to find a place she can call her own. With an all-in budget of $100,000, she's looking for a small home with a porch. Ben and Erin transform the house using breathtaking Americana charm.

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween

programme.title: Movie: Boo 2! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: When the kids go to a Halloween party at a haunted campground were a number of murders were once committed, Madea, Bam and Hattie set out to bring them home before anything bad can happen to them, but a chainsaw-wielding killer gets there before they do.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Nightmare on Peachtree Street
programme.desc: Kandi is busy as ever as she gears up for her Xscape tour and Broadway debut, while also helping Eva throw a Halloween party. Porsha preps for opening night of her play, while Shereé feels betrayed. Cynthia taps into her masculine side.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Head Over 'Hills'
programme.desc: Cynthia's boyfriend Mike decides he's ready to take their relationship to the next level and across town Kandi questions Todd's business moves. Cynthia invites Marlo to lunch to get to the bottom of 'snakegate' and Nene extends an olive branch.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Whine of a Time
programme.desc: The ladies head to Canada to partake in the annual Toronto Carnival but before the festivities can get started, Porsha gets a few things off her chest after Kandi reveals that Eva has not been the loyal friend she claims to be.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: After an icy welcome in Toronto, Nene lays out her standing with each of the girls. Nene and Eva sit face to face and revisit old wounds, while a group trust exercise forces the ladies to live on the edge in an unexpected way. A surprise shocks everyone.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Snake Bye
programme.desc: Porsha is taken by surprise when ex-fiancé Dennis pops up with a ring and unexpected question. Toronto Carnival becomes a circus of intrigue at the final dinner when accusations fly about infidelities and a mysterious lady.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Hairy Situation
programme.desc: Eva is determined to get Marley's last name legally changed, but her biological father may present a roadblock. Now that Dennis has re-proposed to Porsha, he has to also win her family back. Tanya gets messy and dishes out a secret she has on Kenya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Hot Tea With a Side of Cookies
programme.desc: Cynthia brings Tanya and Kenya together to work out their differences after Toronto, but Kenya arrives with a shady guest in tow. Porsha and Dennis go back to couples counseling, while Todd finally makes good on his promise to spend more time with Kandi.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Lions, and Tigers and Shade
programme.desc: Cynthia and NeNe finally sit down to attempt to work through their differences. In an effort to reconcile, NeNe invites the ladies to a brunch, but things don't go according to plan when some guests leave early while other arrive unannounced.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Kenya vs. Ken
programme.desc: Cynthia and Mike's relationship is tested when his past becomes too much for Cynthia to handle. The girls kick out their frustrations during a game of kickball. Marc is back in town and invites Kenya's nemesis to group 'couple bowling.'

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: In the Name of Charity
programme.desc: Cynthia hosts a baby shower for Eva and hopes for an afternoon of love and light despite lingering tensions in the group. When the fun and games are over, Kenya makes a bold request of Tanya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Greece Is the Word
programme.desc: Kenya and Marc announce their divorce. Kandi and Cynthia ask the women to be on their best behavior, but the ask is nearly impossible for Nene and Marlo. After the announcement, Kenya shows up to Greece in good spirits.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Greek Tragedy in 6 Acts
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding with Nene, Kenya is ready to put the drama behind her but finds herself in hot water with Cynthia when she asks some inappropriate questions. An intense conversation rehashing old wounds brings Porsha and Nene to tears.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ruined Peaches
programme.desc: Porsha and Tanya attempt to get all the girls to reconcile. Nene apologizes to Kenya for her hurtful comments. Marlo sends Kenya to her breaking point. On their last day in Greece, Kandi and Cynthia are determined to make up with Nene and Kenya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: More Love More Problems
programme.desc: After a tumultuous trip to Greece, the women are back home in the ATL. Kandi heads to Chicago for a major acting opportunity, but her absence at home reopens old wounds. Eva debuts her baby to the world while Kenya's marriage hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Muscle Memory

programme.title: Counting Cars: Not So Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: The shop agrees to build a brave father a hot rod wheelchair, and Danny gets stuck in a bind when a pink car project doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Horseplay
programme.desc: A high wire performer wants Danny to build a bike to commemorate his career and the records he has broken, and an Extreme Cowboy Racer wants the world's coolest trailer tricked out for her racing partner, Honey the Horse.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Better Late Than Never
programme.desc: Shannon recruits the guys to help him finish up a gift for Danny: a bike he started building for him 10 years ago. Ryan works to keep Danny out of the shop so that Shannon can finish the bike, and winds up buying a sweet Baja Bug in the process.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sailor's Soul
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tommy Lee's Chopper
programme.desc: When Tommy Lee's beloved bike gets crushed in an accident, he turns to the only person he trusts to fix it: the guys who built it, Count's Kustoms. Danny and Ryan take in a cool collection to cheer them up after seeing Tommy's smashed bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: Danny and the team are commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its World War II-era glory. Even with a $50,000 budget, the project turns into one of the biggest challenges in Count's Kustoms history.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: The crew continues to piece together a WWII era Triumph motorcycle for a client hoping to have it as a tribute to his family's military roots.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mike Gets Medieval
programme.desc: Danny tasks Mike with painting a Medieval mural on a '73 GMC Pick Up truck, a decision he soon regrets. He also stumbles across a rare Carroll Shelby designed sportster.

programme.title: American Pickers: Big Boy Toys
programme.desc: At an awesome California garage, Mike goes nuts for a must-have retro boat and then falls for a BMW micro car that could be worth some serious coin. Down the road, the guys pay a return visit to a totally rad radiator shop.

programme.title: American Pickers: Raze the Roof
programme.desc: With the roof caving in on his massive family stockpile, a Kentucky collector is motivated to sell whatever he can before it's too late. And that's great news for Mike and Frank because the mega-pick features a mind-boggling array of awesome stuff.

programme.title: American Pickers: Mad as a Picker
programme.desc: Danielle and the guys kick it into overdrive when they land a high-profile custom pick for Dollywood, the theme park owned by legendary country music star Dolly Parton.

programme.title: American Pickers: The Superfan
programme.desc: Mike makes a big league offer on an ultra-rare vintage Edison invention and a mega stash of beer-related memorabilia stokes Frank's Oktoberfest mojo.

programme.title: American Pickers: Picker's Code
programme.desc: The guys get a lead from a fellow picker. Then, the toughest obstacle is making a deal with 'the Godfather of Junk.'

programme.desc: A drug addict comes clean to his family about his habit and admits he wants to seek help.

programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Earthflight, A Nature Special Presentation: Asia and Australia
Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Earthflight, A Nature Special Presentation: Asia and Australia
The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Making Worlds
programme.desc: Steve Backshall reveals the incredible influence that insects and their close relatives have on our planet's many ecosystems. In South America, the landscape has been created almost solely by one team of insects: grass-cutter ants.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: Nancy and her children are found dead in an apparent murder-suicide. Fifteen years later, Donna falls to her death in the Grand Canyon. But investigators discover they're linked and are confronted by a serial killer who's been lying in wait for decades.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A serial killer stalks Orange County, CA, targeting the homeless. Meanwhile, a young man stands accused of murdering his family. Investigators must race to find the crucial link between the cases.

programme.title: See No Evil: We Never Fight
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 23-year-old Christina Morris goes missing while out with friends in Plano, Texas. Police franticly search to find her alive, but it's the discovery of surveillance camera footage that reveals the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a 14-year-old girl vanishes without a trace on her way to school. Her parents have no idea where she could be. Investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage, but are unsure if they will find her before its too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Night Shift
programme.desc: 18-year-old Kyle Farishian is working the late shift at a 7-Eleven on Halloween when he is brutally attacked by a masked assailant. With no physical evidence, detectives scrutinize the convenience store's surveillance footage for any clues.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Sierra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Sierra LaMar leaves for school like any other day, only to disappear without a trace. Surveillance footage helps reveal if she is just another typical runaway or if something a lot worse happens to Sierra.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Candy Run
programme.desc: A family's nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns. The desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Young professional Sasha Samsudean comes home from a night out in downtown Orlando and is brutally murdered in her own apartment. Detectives must now turn to video surveillance footage to unravel the mystery and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: See No Evil: Driven to the Edge
programme.desc: After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Her husband is devastated and detectives have few clues to work with... until chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gone in the Night
programme.desc: A couple wakes up to find their baby's crib empty. They are certain she has been kidnapped. But many believe the parents are the culprits.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: By the River's Edge
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead along the banks of a North Carolina river. A man is convicted for her murder. But is he truly guilty, or the victim of over-zealous investigators? A crusading attorney, certain he's innocent, fights to free him from prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Catch a Genius
programme.desc: A beautiful wife is dead from nicotine poisoning and her husband needs to beat the murder rap.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Unknown Child
programme.desc: A girl is found murdered in a California restaurant parking lot. A tenacious investigator, a forensic sculptor and a report by 48 HOURS would help break the case. But identifying the girl was the first step. Would her killer be found? Harold Dow reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A mother of two claims she saw the murder of a friend in her dreams. In fact the dream was a reality and her friend was later found bludgeoned to death in Central Florida.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy: Bill Bundy
programme.desc: Detective Jason Moran re-opens the case of serial killer John Wayne Gacy. Unbelievably, eight of his 33 victims were unidentified. The grieving family of Bill Bundy, missing for 40 years, wonder if he might have been a victim.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy: Edward Beaudion
programme.desc: The grieving family of Chicago youth Edward Beaudion, missing for 40 years, wonder if he had been a victim of John Wayne Gacy.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy: Jimmy Haakenson
programme.desc: The grieving family of St. Paul boy Jimmy Haakenson, missing for 40 years, wonder if he had been a victim of Gacy.

programme.title: Serial Killer: The Devil Unchained: A Killer Revealed - Part 1
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Maria Awes gets a call from serial killer Todd Kohlhepp who claims he killed more than his seven known victims. She teams up with his biographer and FBI 'mindhunter' John Douglas to get to the truth.

programme.title: Serial Killer: The Devil Unchained: A Killer Revealed
programme.desc: Digging into Todd Kohlhepp's troubled youth, Maria interviews his first rape victim and finds a new possible victim. Meanwhile, doubts emerge that he is the Superbike killer, which appear supported by interrogation footage.

programme.title: Serial Killer: The Devil Unchained: In Plain Sight - Part One
programme.desc: Ballistic evidence doesn't match Todd's own confession and Maria visits the scene of the Superbike murders. She learns from one victim's family that investigators missed the chance to question Todd for the crime.

programme.title: Serial Killer: The Devil Unchained: In Plain Sight - Part Two
programme.desc: Maria investigates Todd's shocking life after the Superbike murders, when he amassed an arsenal of high-powered guns and participated in a human hunt club. She also learns intimate details from his lover and investigates whether he had an accomplice.

programme.title: Serial Killer: Devil Unchained: Lost In The Woods
programme.desc: Maria tries to identify a Kohlhepp accomplice and faces a gruesome new discovery before accepting a personal invitation to Todd's property; the trip takes an emotional toll, and when Todd confesses to two more murders, Maria seeks the sheriff's help.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Uncover the extraordinary truth behind some of the Mafia's most notorious outlaws.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Roy DeMeo
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood
programme.desc: In Deadwood, a mining camp swirling with violence and vice, Seth Bullock is the only stabilizing force standing in the way of utter chaos.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Revolution
programme.desc: The bitter rivalry between capitalism and communism rages from Berlin to Havana, and all the way to outer space. Russia seals themselves behind an Iron Curtain. A move that spawns the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy, emerges, and it's in the United States’ own backyard. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game. This is the Cold War.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the word descends further in chaos...closer to the edge of WWIII.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades two global superpowers face off, poised for swift and terrible action, threatening to annihilate one another, with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle - and at times, a deadly game. It is the Cold War.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: River House of Dreams
programme.desc: Designer Sarah Richardson is back at the country house with some valuable advice on the design of the master en-suite. Meanwhile at the suburban house, the guys use some cool technology to improve the home's energy efficiency.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swim-pressive
programme.desc: Lucas is ready to take on any challenge.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: This Hits the Spa
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Pressure: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads his original pressure cooker episode with a brand-new broth and his take on the Vietnamese classic, pho.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione Vs. Dang
programme.desc: Vietnamese chef Thai Dang fishes for a win from the Chairman during his battle against Iron Chef Marc Forgione. Judges Jonathan Waxman and Tanya Holland will determine a winner.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Gallante
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against Shea Gallante, executive chef at Ciano in New York.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Okuwa
programme.desc: Chef Makoto Okuwa enters Kitchen Stadium for the first time against Michael Symon.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli vs. Clark
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli faces off against Challenger Robert Clark.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Morimoto Vs. Zakarian
programme.desc: New York-based chef Geoffrey Zakarian enters Kitchen Stadium for the first time to challenge Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Allegretti
programme.desc: Iron Chef Bobby Flay faces off against Challenger Alain Allegretti, Executive Chef at La Promenade des Anglais in New York City.

programme.desc: At Darling Coffee, get your morning brew paired with hand-crafted morning sweets.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Crafters
programme.desc: Meet some of America's most imaginative food crafters who are turning out sweet treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: Featuring Bang Candy Company, Semi Sweet, Wooden Spoon and Donna Bell's Bakeshop.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mash-Ups
programme.desc: We take a bite out of some of the sweetest mash-ups in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Big Apple Breakfast
programme.desc: There's no better way to start your day than with one of New York's most unique breakfast treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: San Fran Sweet Treats
programme.desc: We found three San Francisco restaurants that stand out in this foodie paradise. At Craftsman & Wolves, chef William Werner's attention to detail creates edible works of art like the Caramel Cube Cake that is actually spray-painted.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Super Spicy
programme.desc: Grab a glass of milk and get ready to experience fiery meals from around the country. Ted Allen, Marcela Valladolid, Michael Symon and more are sharing their favorite burning hot dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried Favorites
programme.desc: Fire up the fryer for the crispiest and crunchiest dishes this country has to offer, from gravy-smothered French fries in Cleveland, Ohio, to tempura-battered bacon in New York City.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bermuda
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of the island of Bermuda, a 21-square-mile British territory with Caribbean soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Honolulu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores a bounty of multicultural delights in Honolulu.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.
