programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: My Sister the Weirdo/ Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party so she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows: Alvin. Needing to find a part time job, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dave Rebooted/ Germs
programme.desc: Dave gets temporary amnesia so the boys trick him into letting them skip school and go on a ski trip instead.Theodore becomes obsessed with cleanliness after a speaker at school talks to the class about the danger of germs.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pizza Dash/ Glory Days
programme.desc: The town is under attack when Simon creates a drone that can not only deliver pizzas but has the ability to learn.Alvin worries the munks are responsible for making Dave boring when they find out he used to be a rock star.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Secret Room
programme.desc: Captain Man reveals a 'Crimefighters Only' room in the Man Cave, so Charlotte, Jasper and Schwoz make a cooler room to show them up. When the gang then fights over who gets the better room, things get blown out of proportion.

programme.title: Henry Danger: My Dinner With Big Foot
programme.desc: The kids befriend Bigfoot, so Kid Danger and Captain Man must get rid of a hunter trying to capture him.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Charlotte Gets Ghosted
programme.desc: Charlotte is sucked into Schwoz's new vacuum, and Henry needs to find a way to get her out.

programme.title: Henry Danger: I Dream of Danger
programme.desc: Charlotte avoids Kid Danger after having a dream of nearly kissing him.

programme.title: The Thundermans: No Country for Old Mentors
programme.desc: Phoebe feels pressure to choose her dad over her favourite next-gen hero in the Superhero Mentor Program and soon regrets her decision once she sees his old and outdated techniques.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Thundermans: Secret Revealed
programme.desc: With the Villain League determined to halt Phoebe's superhero ascension and destroy the Thundermans altogether, Max must finally choose between fighting for good with his family, or a life of evil against them.

programme.title: The Thundermans: He Got Game Night
programme.desc: Hank raises the stakes of family game night to a new high, and each member of the family will do whatever it takes to win the grand prize.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Zombies Eat Unicorns!
programme.desc: Host Jay Pharoah introduces two mystery celebs hiding behind 3D animated filters. Darci Lynne Farmer, Gabrielle Nevaeh Green and Lex Lumpkin ask questions and gather clues to unveil our two special guests.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: A button that appears out of nowhere tempts the cast. Simplicity, the easiest game show in the world, is played, positive Poppi gives words of affirmation, and Coach Kreeton returns to Dullmont Jr. High to give a pep talk. Kane Brown performs.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Boss Battle Bonanza
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The First Ever Summer Games Showdown
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Aunt Cass stumbles into an underground cooking competition, she thrives and becomes addicted to the excitement.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Aunt Cass Goes Out
programme.desc: After Aunt Cass nearly figures out Hiro’s secret life as a member of Big Hero 6, Hiro plays matchmaker to find Aunt Cass a boyfriend to distract her.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Master Devolos!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Battling the Beast Within!
Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Drew Bledsoe: Better With Age
programme.desc: An unfiltered interview with former number one draft pick Drew Bledsoe, on living in the shadow of the Tom Brady dynasty, the tackle that nearly cost him his life and how he's found peace as a successful winemaker.

programme.title: E:60: Imperfect: The Roy Halladay Story
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of his perfect game, and more than two years after his tragic death, Halladay's family speaks for the first time on camera about his struggles with addiction and mental health, and the details of his fatal plane crash.

programme.title: The Closer: Jump the Gun
programme.desc: A bank robbery supposedly committed by a known gang of thieves leaves a security guard dead. It also leaves a lot of unanswered questions about the prime suspects and why this latest robbery doesn't fit their regular pattern.

programme.title: The Closer: War Zone
programme.desc: In a case that could carry national security implications, three soldiers are gunned down outside an L.A. club two days after returning home from duty in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Just Push Play
programme.desc: A singer and guitar player is brutally and mysteriously stabbed in a bar. As details emerge in the case, the squad soon realizes that the victim had something to hide. Meanwhile, Jane's dad returns with shocking news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Food for Thought
programme.desc: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve Boston's most twisted cases.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: You're Gonna Miss Me When I'm Gone
programme.desc: Homeland security steps in when a senator's daughter is found murdered. The squad rushes to solve the case, which could put national security at risk. Meanwhile, Tommy starts slipping back into old habits and Jane reveals shocking news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A New Day
programme.desc: Solving the murder of a jogger takes on even greater urgency when Jane realizes that the motive was theft of the woman's baby. As the investigation gets underway, Jane attempts to hide her pregnancy from her snooping mother.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: ...Goodbye
programme.desc: A woman arrives at the station covered in blood, carrying a gun and saying she killed someone. Due to the trauma of what she did, she has forgotten who she is and who the victim is. The team tries to unravel this bizarre case.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Too Good to Be True
programme.desc: A killer is using online ads to find the perfect candidate for murder: men no one will notice are missing. Meanwhile, Jane discovers that keeping her pregnancy quiet will be a tough assignment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)

programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: The Browns rush to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain but things to awry just days before the ceremony.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: The Infinity crew is on its way to Dutch Harbor and a brewing storm system threatens to put them through their first real test. They stop in an atoll to get the boat storm-ready but they quickly find themselves anchored in an area littered with bombs.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: France: Come on Baby, Light My Fire
programme.desc: Michael and Benedicte are dropped in the middle of a dense forest in Croatia. Extreme fluctuations in weather threaten hypothermia and intense humidity, and predators like wolves, bears and vipers call home. Their journey is translated into English.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Baked Alaskan
programme.desc: A deadly spider bite puts Gwen, an Alaskan homesteader at risk of tapping but she works with her partner to get her revenge, in the 130-degree heat of the Mexican jungle.

programme.title: Biker Build-Off: Mike Metzger vs. Larry Linkogle

programme.title: Biker Build-Off: Kevin Alsop vs. Ivy Trosclair

programme.title: Biker Build-Off: Roland Sands vs. Jesse Rooke
programme.desc: Meet Roland Sand and Jesse Rooke, two builders based out of Southern California. Both men are convinced that that can build the fastest bike.

programme.title: Biker Build-Off: Marcus Walz vs. Mike Prugh
programme.desc: Two designers, one from Germany, the other from South Dakota, fight for world domination.

programme.title: American Chopper: Getting the Bike Back Together
programme.desc: The OCC crew builds one of their fastest bikes ever but a problem with the supercharger threatens the schedule. Junior races to complete a complicated bike for a client. Father and son find it hard to let go of the past while restoring a bike together.

programme.title: American Chopper: A New Chopter
programme.desc: Senior confronts Junior about the harsh words Junior wrote in his book. Senior closes a game-changing deal with an exotic car dealership to sell OCC bikes directly to the public and Junior's simple mistake leads to destruction in the shop.

programme.title: American Chopper: Metal Health
programme.desc: The OCC crew is pushed to the limit building a pair of contrasting bikes for a client; Junior struggles with an ethanol-fueled motorcycle during assembly; Junior makes a change to the Yankees bike design, and Senior confronts him.

programme.title: American Chopper: GTO, Bro!

programme.title: American Chopper: Drop the Mikey

programme.title: American Chopper: The Last Ride
programme.desc: After hearing about demolition plans for the old Orange County Choppers building, Junior asks his dad to build one last bike together in the old shop. Senior agrees but the father-son team's clashing styles threaten to throw the entire project off track.

programme.desc: When George and Angie fill in at the dunk tank at school, the students pull a prank.

programme.title: George Lopez: The Art of Boxing
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to his mom, Max takes up boxing at a local ring owned by Laila Ali.

programme.title: Full House: A Fish Called Martin
programme.desc: Michelle's new fish, Martin, meets a tragic end when she gives him a bubble bath.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fun-Sized Friends/ Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise/ Pups Save a Tower of Pizza
programme.desc: Rocky and the Pups are fixing an Old-Timey Junk Car for Ace Sorensen's Birthday. Adventure Bay is working hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Sailing Boat/ Molly Mole/ Soft Play/ The Market/ Bedtime Story
programme.desc: Peppa and George go sailing with Grandpa Pig, but he keeps getting the boat stuck in the mud. They all decide to have a sleepover on the boat while they wait for the tide to come back in.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Blue's Big Beat Band
programme.desc: Josh and Blue are starting a band. As we play Blue's Clues to find out what instrument Blue will play, we form our very own house band, learn rhythms, identify tempos, and sing, tap, and clap all day long.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Butterflies/ Pups Save an Underground Chicken
programme.desc: Chickaletta is stuck on a runaway drone and mysterious butterflies are causing chaos all around Adventure Bay. The statue of Chickaletta has been stolen by Mayor Humdinger and is making its way through Adventure Bay's underground tunnel system.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Ninja Season
programme.desc: Gil wants to be a ninja, but his teacher just keeps giving him random tasks to do. When he is later challenged, he realizes he's been learning ninja skills all along.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Genie in a Bubble
programme.desc: When Nonny, Gil and Zooli conjure a genie, she agrees to grant whoever brings her the most precious gift a wish. They think it might be a precious gem, but turns out it's friendship.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: AJ to the Rescue
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud. Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends to save him.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Babysitting Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are helping their friend Stripes look after some baby animals, when the little critters accidentally float away on big bubbles.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger and his nephew accidentally send a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The PAW Patrol gets superpowers from the meteor's golden energy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
programme.desc: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins/ Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay, taking all of the town's treasures including Mayor Goodway. The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day, and the Mayor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Valentine's Day/ The Paper
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day and SpongeBob shows that one man's trash can be another's treasure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fools in April/ Neptune's Spatula
programme.desc: It's April Fool's Day, so SpongeBob gets to play harmless pranks for the entire day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car. Patrick thinks he is an old man, so SpongeBob reminds him how much fun it is to be a kid.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Weather Beyond Control
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of survivors who lived through treacherous conditions.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Control
programme.desc: Winter that's one for the record books, a bus that tries to outrun rare Romanian tornado and a shelf cloud that is the stuff of nightmares when wild weather is unleashed.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Come Rain or Cyclone
programme.desc: Water is a necessity of life but in certain forms, it can threaten it. From surviving a monster typhoon in India, completing a record-breaking free dive to a horrifying plunge into a sinkhole, we are always at the mercy of water.

programme.title: Mayday: Cold Case
programme.desc: An Air Ontario flight prepares for takeoff at a remote northern airport in heavy snowfall; moments later, the plane struggles to get airborne and crashes into the woods. It takes years for investigators to determine what went wrong.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Monster Storm Hits Europe
programme.desc: 'Great Britain's Storm of the Century' crashes into Europe, the unimaginable happens as four tornadoes touch down in Pilger, Iowa, and what lies beneath those icebergs in Greenland? Dive in and find out.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Harvey Hammers Houston
programme.desc: As Hurricane Harvey hammers Houston, Texas, it becomes the most extreme rainfall event in US history. A local realtor heads out in his boat to rescue a woman and her family.

programme.title: Mayday: Cold Case
programme.desc: An Air Ontario flight prepares for takeoff at a remote northern airport in heavy snowfall; moments later, the plane struggles to get airborne and crashes into the woods. It takes years for investigators to determine what went wrong.

programme.title: Top Ten: Worst Weather Years

programme.desc: It's a test of survival in a blinding blizzard for a pair of college sweethearts trapped on a mountain; freakish storm turns a sailing regatta into a deadly duel with nature on the high seas.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Tornado Trouble & Construction Chaos
programme.desc: Storm chasers turn first responders after a terrifying tornado rips through a town; A life hangs in the balance when a wind fueled blaze burns out of control in a construction site.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Inside Death Zones

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Water Chaos
programme.desc: Hailstorms, lightning and super cells unleash hell. Helicopters ignite the air and snow-mageddon hits Tucson. Mysterious circles form in Namibia, sharks descend on Brisbane and fish wash ashore in India.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Yolanda
programme.desc: Yolanda needs help escaping from the notorious FLDS compound based in Colorado City, Arizona. With a plan to get Yolanda out, the biggest hurdle they face is to remain under the radar and out of sight.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Not Without My Sister
programme.desc: Jessica and Kollene head into unfamiliar territory when they receive word that two sisters, Ariel and Vanna, want to escape the infamous FLDS polygamist cult headquartered in Colorado City and led by Warren Jeffs.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Father's Wrath
programme.desc: Jessica receives a frantic call in the middle of the night from her little sister Jennifer who is being forced to marry someone she doesn't love and wants out. Everyone acts quickly but a last minute stop at The Order bank leads to a confrontation.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Fight Like a Mother
programme.desc: Getting the wife of an influential Order man out is a challenge as her home is surrounded by Order members tasked to keep watch over her day and night.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A former Order member reaches out to Jessica and Kollene fearing that the life of her elderly father, Fred Kingston, is in danger under The Order's watch.

programme.title: Intervention: Emily
programme.desc: Emily suffered from depression and low self-esteem and she now weighs less than 90 pounds.

programme.title: Intervention: Ben and Josh
programme.desc: Ben experienced a childhood filled with domestic violence and homelessness and turned to a drug called DXM. Josh is addicted to food and weighs 550 lbs.

programme.title: Intervention: Samantha C
programme.desc: Samantha was a soccer prodigy, but when a close relative developed an inappropriate relationship with her teammate, it crushed her and her family. Samantha was sexually assaulted and introduced to drugs, heroin and prostitution.

programme.title: Intervention: Robin
programme.desc: Robin learned alcohol washed away the pressure to become perfect. Robin stopped drinking when a friend helped him realize his dream of becoming a pilot. But the stress of being away from his wife and kids sent him back to alcohol.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Family and friends try to help relatives who are struggling with addiction.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part Two)
programme.desc: Things go off the rails for the crew as the Ball rages on. Teddy and Eddie find themselves stuck in an elevator, Ike deals with a drunk Andy, while Lucy struggles to find alone time with her date.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Stop, Drop and Roll With It
programme.desc: Firefighters and Drag Queens enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Hot Sauce Conquers All
programme.desc: A pair of former baristas compete against two wine-loving buddies. It soon becomes clear that pinot and caffeine have nothing on peppers and capsaicin.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrill Seekers 10
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkies are featured from roof jumps to hot-air balloon weddings.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrill Seekers 11
programme.desc: A motorcycle crash, an out of control skydiver, and even an angry bison. And one thing ties them all together: outrageous fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 4

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 5
programme.desc: Be a witness to 20 all-new party moments that you have to see to believe! Grandma's doing keg stands, karaoke singers unable to sing their ABCs, and Aussies shooting fireworks from down under are just a few of the wild moments in this episode.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 6
programme.desc: A naked john runs after the prostitute who stole all his clothes, with memories that will linger after the hangover has passed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 7
programme.desc: In an ongoing mission to bring bad behavior to light, The Smoking Gun presents 20 of the World's Dumbest Partiers. This week, an upside-down drinking contest leaves everyone doused with beer. Meanwhile, a drunk Russian woman does an impromptu strip tease.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 9
programme.desc: Featuring a man so drunk and lazy he urinates in his own bed, and then climbs in and goes to sleep. Meanwhile, a group of intoxicated college students snowboard down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: Botched: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: After a dog ripped off half her lip, a 25-year-old seeks help from the doctors while a woman who pumps up her own 4600cc breasts at home gets some much needed advice. Meanwhile, Dr. Dubrow tackles a butt that's affected by spina bifida.

programme.title: Botched: The Boobinati

programme.title: Botched: Gimme Gimme More... Surgery

programme.title: American Mystery!: Triangles

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Mothman, Al Capone and Mary Celeste
programme.desc: Don Wildman reveals the shocking truth behind an insect-like monster, recounts the tale of the vengeful spirit that haunted the infamous mobster Al Capone and investigates a ghostly ship found adrift on the high seas.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Lizzie Borden, Bigfoot and Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates the greatest unsolved murder in American history, reveals a crucial piece of evidence in the hunt for Bigfoot and uncovers the true origins of the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Amelia Earhart, Phoenix Lights and Russian Roswell
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a potential clue in the disappearance of Amelia Earhart, uncovers a video camera that captured UFOs in the Arizona nights skies and examines mysterious debris that may be proof of alien intelligence.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Mummy's Curse and Nazi Art Hoax
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a deadly pharaoh's curse and reveals the truth behind a secret operation to sell phony art to the Nazis.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Alcatraz, Conjoined Twins and Lincoln Grave Robbery
programme.desc: Don unearths four dummy heads that helped three inmates escape from Alcatraz, examines the medical mystery that defined a famous pair of conjoined twins and investigates the attempted robbery of Abraham Lincoln's grave in Springfield, Illinois.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Hope Diamond, Jersey Devil and Titanic
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a magnificent gem imbued with a deadly curse, uncovers a message that could've averted the Titanic's collision course with disaster and examines the mystery of the Jersey Devil.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Yeti, Roswell and Mummies
programme.desc: Don Wildman uncovers the secret behind dozens of perfectly preserved mummies in Mexico, examines an intriguing piece of Yeti evidence and investigates the world's most-famous UFO conspiracy.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Loch Ness, Headless Haunting and Prophet Edgar Cayce
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates the truth behind a legendary monster, recounts the tale of a vengeful lover who returned from the grave and reveals the final resting place of the Sleeping Prophet.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Moving Up and Moving On
programme.desc: Kenya takes her separation from Marc one step further, while Cynthia struggles to decide if she should make the big move to Los Angeles. NeNe and Gregg celebrate their 23rd anniversary in a very unconventional way, and Eva moves into her new dream home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: On the day of Kandi's baby shower, Mama Joyce and Todd's old feud reignites. NeNe gets the scoop on some bad press circulating about her, meanwhile Porsha has newfound issues with Kenya. Kandi's baby shower commences with a 'star is born' theme.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Sip and See You Later
programme.desc: Gizelle spends her birthday with Jamal and the girls, Candiace struggles to understand Monique's anger towards her, Wendy takes note of Karen's cold shoulder. Ashley hosts the ladies to meet baby Dean, but an unexpected guest makes Monique bail.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Celebrations and Strange Explanations
programme.desc: Gizelle struggles with the fact that her daughters have questions about her rekindling a relationship with their father. Candace and Ashley bury their year-long feud and Monique expresses marital frustrations to Chris. Karen throws a housewarming party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Look Who's Squawking
programme.desc: Monique invites everyone to her lake house for the weekend. Karen expresses her dislike for Wendy's obsession with her sex life. Gizelle and Candace's friendship takes a surprising turn. Ashley decides to bring baby Dean along for the festivities.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Look Who's Squawking
programme.desc: Monique invites everyone to her lake house for the weekend. Karen expresses her dislike for Wendy's obsession with her sex life. Gizelle and Candace's friendship takes a surprising turn. Ashley decides to bring baby Dean along for the festivities.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show

programme.title: Below Deck: There's a New Captain in Town

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sharks and Cobras
programme.desc: Rick and the Old Man look to buy a 1956 Shelby Cobra, which is one of the USA's most expensive racecars.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Top Secret
programme.desc: The guys have the chance to buy top-secret maps and battle plans for Iwo Jima.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Deals From Hell
programme.desc: A man is looking to sell his several hundred year old copy of Dante's Inferno.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sink or Sell
programme.desc: Corey gets into deep water with his dad when he buys a 1984 Chris Craft boat without first testing it out. An old timer brings Rick an 1849 colt revolver that he forgot to unload.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Open wide with the Pawn Stars when an early 1900s Peerless Harvard dental chair rolls into the shop. Then, Rick gets ready to party on when memorabilia from the 1990s movie 'Wayne's World' is brought in. Later, Rick gets a secret admirer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Colts and Vikings
programme.desc: Go great guns with the Pawn Stars when a Colt Army model 1860 shoots into the shop. Then, Rick sets his sights on a Viking coin.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Playboys and Players
programme.desc: A collection of Playboy Club memorabilia hops into the shop. Then, Corey and Chum check out a pair or old Murray bicycles, one of which has never been ridden. Later, the Old Man decides to go to the shooting range, but Rick thinks he needs some back up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Flying High
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are ready to rock when a guitar that has been signed by Garry Tallent arrives. Then, Rick has a look at a replica 1964 Peace Dollar. Later, Rick challenges Chum to a paper airplane contest.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Seven Barreled Pawn
programme.desc: A Nock Valley gun used by the Royal Navy; an etching by Joan Miro; the first American pasta machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wound Up Rick
programme.desc: An autograph Led Zeppelin album; an antique whistle collection; a Doonesbury cartoon pencils; a self-winding clock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Patent
programme.desc: An autograph of astronomer Edwin Hubble; an 1850s patent model self-lighting and extinguishing lantern; a Starrett Food Chopper; an 1871 British Martini-Henry Short Lever Rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A drawing of John Lennon; Senator William Sharon's engraved menu from the Comstock Lode; a Role water pressure tester; a 1950s Buddy Lee doll.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ultimate Fighting Pawn
programme.desc: An antique high wheel bike captivates Rick. Chum sells one of Rick's beloved Japanese katanas to UFC President Dana White. Rick heads out to look at a beautifully-restored grand piano from the 1800s. An original Walkman cassette player stops by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned and Confused
programme.desc: A seller brings his Led Zeppelin vinyl collection to Rick and Chum. A fancy 19th century office desk may be a worthwhile buy. A game-used base from the 2016 World Series could be a home run for the guys. Rick takes a trip to see 'The Object.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pistol Is Mightier Than the Sword
programme.desc: Rick checks out a sword-pistol combo from the 1700s. A portrait of John Barrymore, the famous film and theatre actor, may be worth a buy. Rick learns about an antique navigational timepiece from the 19th century. Corey's excited about a 1969 Harley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: In the Presence of Greatness
programme.desc: A Batman utility belt toy from the 1960s is within Rick and Chum's grasp. An impeccable Mosrite electric guitar could be a sweet deal for the shop. Rick continues to search for 'The Object,' an item featured on the cover of Led Zeppelin's 'Presence.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: United States of Pawn
programme.desc: One million is on the line when a photograph of Abraham and Mary Todd Lincoln makes its way into the shop. Next, an Easter egg signed by the entire Bush family sends Chumlee hopping.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn It Out of the Park
programme.desc: Rick heads east to test a rare weapon from the 18th century. Back at the shop, Corey takes a swing at a Mickey Mantle rookie card. Then, our military expert Alex brews something special for Rick's eyes only.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed

programme.title: Bunk'd: Manic Moose Day

programme.title: Bunk'd: Breaking Barb

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Enter the Dranis

programme.title: Jessie: Throw Momma from the Terrace
programme.desc: Jessie invites Bertram's mom to visit as a surprise for his birthday. However, unbeknownst to Jessie, Bertram and his mom do not get along. Meanwhile, Ravi and Luke compete in a school egg-drop competition.

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie
programme.desc: Jessie is concerned that Tony has become controlling, clingy and insecure in their relationship. After Tony invites her out for a 'very special night' to meet his parents, she is terrified that he is going to propose.

programme.title: Jessie: Say Yes to the Messy Dress
programme.desc: When NBA player Chris Bosh needs somewhere to stay, Jessie volunteers the penthouse.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friend-Ship
programme.desc: Raven and the kids plan a road trip to visit Chelsea at her cruise ship and encounter several obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Shoe-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Last Dances and Last Chances

programme.desc: Mike and Ellen Snyder’s marriage begins to escalate in tension until suddenly Mike disappears, leaving behind his family. Not knowing if he left and began a new life or was in danger, his own sister begins to press authorities to investigate further.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Long Goodbye

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crate n' Burial
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit and run death of a little girl.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Defectors
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing teenage girl who is feared to have been recruited by a terrorist organization.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: While Deeks is under arrest and interrogated for the murder of his former partner, the team races to try and prove his innocence.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Cancel Christmas
programme.desc: When a suspected North Korean spy is poisoned and hit by a truck carrying Christmas trees, the team must search for who is responsible for smuggling spies into the country. Also, Deeks and Kensi try to find a way to include their mothers at Christmas.

programme.title: NCIS: Day in Court
programme.desc: In order to clear his name, a petty officer volunteers to be court martialed if NCIS agrees to conduct its own investigation after his murder case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant. Also, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems.

programme.title: NCIS: Blood Brothers

programme.title: NCIS: Spinning Wheel

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Hunt for the Nuclear Monster
programme.desc: When evidence of a strange creature is captured on tape near deserted power plant, experts suspect the footage could be linked a recent nuclear disaster. Using cutting-edge tech, scientists investigate if a toxic monster is on the loose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Hunt for the Nuclear Monster
programme.desc: When evidence of a strange creature is captured on tape near deserted power plant, experts suspect the footage could be linked a recent nuclear disaster. Using cutting-edge tech, scientists investigate if a toxic monster is on the loose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Hindenburg
programme.desc: When the Nazi airship Hindenburg exploded in a giant ball of fire, the world's largest aircraft in history became one of its greatest catastrophes, and now, new technology might finally reveal what caused the fatal crash and if it was an act of sabotage.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: The Inca capital of Cusco was said to be the site of untold gold and riches, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the secrets behind this mighty empire's fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 5
programme.desc: Investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore seven ancient pyramids from around the world; as experts explore their lost labyrinths and alien relics, they discover unexplained connections between cultures thousands of miles and years apart.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Rome
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological methods help experts unearth the dark secrets hidden at seven wonders of ancient Rome. What they find challenges everything we know about this once-mighty empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Egypt
programme.desc: Seven wonders of ancient Egypt are home to mysteries still unsolved thousands of years after their construction, and today, investigators use cutting-edge tech and forensic analysis to reveal new secrets of these colossal engineering marvels.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Ancient America
programme.desc: America before Columbus was home to some of the greatest engineering marvels on the planet. Special access to hi-tech archaeological digs reveals the secrets of ancient America's Seven Wonders as experts investigate their mysterious purposes.

programme.title: Serial Killer: Devil Unchained: Lost In The Woods
programme.desc: Maria tries to identify a Kohlhepp accomplice and faces a gruesome new discovery before accepting a personal invitation to Todd's property; the trip takes an emotional toll, and when Todd confesses to two more murders, Maria seeks the sheriff's help.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Golden State Killer
programme.desc: In the 1970s a serial rapist is on the loose in northern California. And just as his reign of terror over the community wanes, police discover he isn't just a serial rapist, he's a serial murderer and he's been killing people all over California.

programme.title: Jeffrey Dahmer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.title: Shattered: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: Shattered: The House on Hamilton Avenue
programme.desc: In 2006, Officer Mike Kermon is the first to arrive at a house on Hamilton Avenue where neighbors believe shots have been fired. As he enters the quiet home, he has no idea that what he'll find inside will change his life forever.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Message in Red
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is gunned down in the presence of children, a cryptic message scrawled across the home leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related. The only problem is, there's no evidence the victims had any involvement in the drug trade.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Average Troublemaker
programme.desc: When teenager Bridgett Frisbie sneaks out of her Katy, TX home one night, her parents assume it's just typical teenage rebellion. But the next day, a group of boys find her body in the woods just outside of town.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lurking in the Hollers
programme.desc: Family means everything to folks who live in the mountain hollers of Townsend, Tennessee. When one member of the large Griffin clan is found murdered and another goes missing, investigators begin to suspect that a family feud may have taken a deadly turn.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lookin' for Souls to Steal
programme.desc: When two college students are gunned down while parked in a quiet lovers' lane in Juliette, Georgia, the tiny community is beside itself with panic.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich

programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate

programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.desc: Fallon and Mark Jennings are Texas natives with a big Texas family, and they're on the hunt for the perfect waterside home on North Padre Island.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread Lovers' Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes an essential element of brunch, bread, and makes it the star of every dish on his inventive menu from croque Madame bread pudding with herb-crusted tomatoes to a simple pull-apart cinnamon bread and a gazpacho bloody Maria.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Irish Style Brunch

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.desc: The Navy SEALs help to qualm the violence being felt throughout Iraq's cities because of a terrorist insurgency. Street fighting dominates, but the SEALs are trained with small-unit tactics, making this type of combat ideal for them.

programme.title: Heroes of World War II With Walter Cronkite: The Air War
programme.desc: On September 1, 1939, Germany invades Poland starting the greatest war the world has ever known. Six million Jews and countless 'undesirables' were exterminated by the Nazis. There were millions of Allied and Axis casualties.

programme.title: Navy SEALs: America's Secret Warriors: Kill or Capture

programme.title: 4-4-43: The Greatest Story Every Told: The War on the Pacific
programme.desc: Ten American prisoners-of-war and two Filipino convicts undertake arguably the most daring mission of WWII on April 4, 1943. Together, they escape the Davao Penal Colony, a supposedly escape-proof Japanese Army prison plantation in the Philippines.

programme.title: Heroes of World War II With Walter Cronkite: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: In 1939, Germany invades Poland starting the greatest war the world has ever known.

programme.desc: Brennan is enlisted to identify the remains of a six-year-old who went missing from a local park. Brennan determines that Charlie was sexually assaulted before he was murdered, which leads Booth to conclude they're on the hunt for a serial pedophile.

programme.title: Bones: The Man in the Wall
programme.desc: When Brennan and Angela get caught in a dance club, Brennan kicks someone into a wall causing it to break open revealing a mummified corpse and a stash of methamphetamines.

programme.title: Bones: The Man on Death Row
programme.desc: Howard Epps is scheduled to be executed by lethal injection unless his attorney can make a last minute appeal to Booth and Brennan to re-examine the case.

programme.title: Charmed: The Primrose Empath
programme.desc: Phoebe and Piper are on a mission to save Prue after a botched spell gives her the unwanted gift of feeling all the pain in the world.

programme.title: Charmed: Power Outrage
programme.desc: The sisters become defenceless when their anger towards each other breaks their bond.

programme.title: Charmed: Sleuthing With the Enemy
programme.desc: Phoebe must decide whether or not she will kill Cole, the man she loves, or let him go.

programme.title: Charmed: Coyote Piper
programme.desc: A demon lacking inhibitions possesses Piper on the night of her 10-year high-school reunion.

programme.title: Supernatural: Optimism
programme.desc: Sam and Charlie team up to get to the bottom of a string of random disappearances. Jack believes that he has found a case and convinces Dean to partner up with him on the hunt.

programme.title: Supernatural: Unhuman Nature
programme.desc: Sam and Castiel track down a Shaman who may be able to help a friend. Nick continues to spiral down a dark path as he looks for answers surrounding the deaths of his wife and son. Jack turns to Dean for help enjoying the human experience.

programme.title: Supernatural: Byzantium

programme.title: Supernatural: The Spear
programme.desc: Sam and Dean enlist the help of their pal Garth to gain information on what Michael may be planning. The brothers split up to each go after weapons that can aid in their fight against the Archangel but this may be a fight they cannot win.

programme.title: Supernatural: Nihilism

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Robbing the Banks
programme.desc: Valuable items begin to disappear after Will convinces Philip to hire a former convict.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Bundle of Joy

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: When Monique refuses to have sex until she's married, Will stages a mock wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Living Single: Love Don't Live Here Anymore
programme.desc: A night of passion for Max and Kyle forces them to make a decision.

programme.title: Living Single: Love Don't Live Here Anymore
programme.desc: Synclaire and Overton are stranded on a deserted island, and Max makes a choice.

programme.title: Living Single: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Kadijah has a date with NBA star Cedric Cebalos.
