programme.desc: Regine has to let Mr. Perfect go when his devotion to his dog becomes too much.

programme.title: Living Single: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Max's old college law professor comes to town for a lecture and makes her move on him.

programme.title: CrazySexyCool: The TLC Story
programme.desc: Follow the story of TLC's humble beginnings in Atlanta to their unprecedented rise to fame in the 1990's as one of the world's most talented and highest-selling female groups of all time.

programme.title: Movie: Love at Sea
programme.desc: Event planner Olivia gets a great opportunity to organize an event on a luxury cruise. She meets her match in the charming Tony, who is on a trial run as Cruise Director, but they must work together to make the cruise event a hit.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Safari
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet with the head Ranger. Upon learning that the park is in financial jeopardy, and may have to be sold to her uncle's competitor, he urges her to take on a Safari.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Prince
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a woman meets a mysterious man at her parents store in small-town Georgia. When a photo of them is leaked to the press, she is shocked to learn that her potential suitor, is actually a king.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One for the Money
programme.desc: Dorothy and Sophia flashback to their purchase of the family's first television in 1954.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Rose inherits her late uncle's estate, provided she takes care of his prized pig 'Baby.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: The girls hire a new housekeeper and she puts a curse on their house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nothing to Fear But Fear Itself
programme.desc: Dorothy and Blanche accompany Rose to her aunt's funeral where she must give the eulogy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Letter to Gorbachev
programme.desc: Rose writes to Soviet leader Gorbachev and receives an invitation to Moscow.

programme.title: Frasier: The Good Samaritan
programme.desc: Frasier's good impression of people is ruined when a series of good deeds goes awry.

programme.title: Frasier: Our Parents, Ourselves
programme.desc: Frasier is a wannabe Cupid when he arranges a meeting between Martin and Roz's mother.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Woody Shows Up
programme.desc: Frasier is delighted when Woody, his old bartender from Cheers, make a surprise visit.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Valentines
programme.desc: Frasier is flattered by the attention showered upon him by a beautiful executive.

programme.title: Frasier: To Tell the Truth
programme.desc: Niles expects the worst on the eve of his divorce proceedings and Frasier helps him out.

programme.title: Frasier: Decoys
programme.desc: A conniving Niles schemes to play matchmaker with Roz and her former attorney/ boyfriend.

programme.title: Frasier: The Dinner Party
programme.desc: Full of joie de vivre, a jaunty Frasier recruits Niles to plan a simple dinner party.

programme.title: Frasier: Taps at the Montana
programme.desc: The condo board tells Niles his lease will be cancelled due to a previous misadventure.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Writes a Novel
programme.desc: Lucy reads about a housewife who made a fortune writing a novel in her spare time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Club Dance
programme.desc: The girls decide to raise money for their Fine Arts League by sponsoring a dance.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Black Wig
programme.desc: Lucy tries out a new black wig after Ricky objects to her modish Italian boy haircut.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Diner
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes all buy diner together and find they do business differently.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: Movie: A Ring by Spring

programme.title: Movie: Cooking With Love
programme.desc: Fun with a side of love ensues as a television producer and a cook are paired on a children's cooking show.

programme.title: Movie: A Winter Princess

programme.title: The Closer: Executive Order
programme.desc: The murder of two paramedics leads the LSPD and the FBI on two separate investigations on a case that could be the precursor to a major terrorist attack. Brenda fights to remain a step ahead while working with the counter-terrorism unit.

programme.title: The Closer: Old Money
programme.desc: One of Brenda's detectives is ambushed on the street and the main clue to figuring out the motive behind the attack is a garbage bag containing more than $37,500.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Lost and Found
programme.desc: The team races against time to find a young witness to the contract killing of a woman outside of a nightclub. Ultimately, Jane puts herself in the line of fire to save this witness' life.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Allison/ Hagerty
programme.desc: A mom who teaches etiquette swaps places with a mom who lets her kids run wild.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Hodge/ Kolpin
programme.desc: Bobbie Hodge, a backwoods hunting mom from Kentucky whose motto is 'kill it and grill it,' swaps places with Jackie Kolpin, an animal activist mother from Arizona who eats only raw food and has a vegan pet cat that doesn't eat meat.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Wife Swap Saved My Marriage
programme.desc: Catch up with some of last season's 'Wife Swap' families to see dramatic turnarounds; changes the families say are a direct result of their appearance on the show.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Reagan Assassination Attempt
programme.desc: In 1981, a gunman fires six shots at Ronald Reagan. What follows is a chaotic rush to save Reagan's life, confusion at the White House, and an urgent investigation to find out if this is a wider plot, or the work of a lone assassin.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Amanda Knox
programme.desc: In 2007, Amanda Knox, an American exchange student living in Italy, was arrested and tried for the murder of her roommate. The evidence was shockingly graphic, but the DNA was inconclusive. A look at the case and where things stand today.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Andrea Yates
programme.desc: In 2001, Andrea Yates drowned her five small children in the bathtub of their Houston home. Her bizarre explanation was that she did it to save her children from Satan.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: John Lennon Assassination
programme.desc: In 1980, the entire world was stunned by the murder of John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? We will backtrack through the lives of both men to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: American Chopper: The Last Ride
programme.desc: After hearing about demolition plans for the old Orange County Choppers building, Junior asks his dad to build one last bike together in the old shop. Senior agrees but the father-son team's clashing styles threaten to throw the entire project off track.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Liars!
programme.desc: The MSO is surprised when a group of racers claiming to be from Delaware turns out to be a team of racers from all over America. This all-star group is made of familiar faces who have suffered losses at the hands of the MSO and are now hungry for revenge.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: The Lying Continues
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The MSO continues their battle against the revenge-hungry all-stars, but this round includes a couple of heavy hitters who have defeated Memphis in the past.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Gambling Over Grudges
programme.desc: The MSO family loads up the hot rods and heads to Vegas to meet up with King Donnie and a group of West Coast racers. Then during Grudge Night, NOLA is looking stronger than ever and Texas brings out a big-tire car in an attempt to stay in the fight.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Hot Rod From Heaven
programme.desc: The 10th-Annual Rockabilly Weekend car show is right around the corner and Chad has big plans for this year's raffle car! The team races to transform a rusted-out '38 Ford into an open-motor, fenderless hotrod that's guaranteed to sell tickets.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: You Use What You Got
programme.desc: Looking to expand his business, Chad takes on a commission to build a custom 1930s style delivery truck, starting from a discarded 1934 Desoto Airflow coupe.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Gambling Over Grudges
programme.desc: The MSO family loads up the hot rods and heads to Vegas to meet up with King Donnie and a group of West Coast racers. Then during Grudge Night, NOLA is looking stronger than ever and Texas brings out a big-tire car in an attempt to stay in the fight.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Hot Rod From Heaven

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: You Use What You Got
programme.desc: Looking to expand his business, Chad takes on a commission to build a custom 1930s style delivery truck, starting from a discarded 1934 Desoto Airflow coupe.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Rock 'N' Rollin' Pickup
programme.desc: Two bodyguards from Nashville prove to be tough customers when they ask Steve to redesign their Chevy truck into a bat out of hell for their impending wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Power Packing F100 Pickup
programme.desc: An electrical lineman from Texas tasks Steve and the Welderup crew with customizing his company's first work truck, a trusty old early 1970s Ford pickup.

programme.title: Cajun Navy
programme.desc: The story of American heroes who risk life and limb to save people whose homes have been wrecked by hurricanes. After Katrina, a flotilla of volunteers took to the waters to save lives and they’ve been doing so ever since.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Blood and Mud
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey ends up battered and bruised after snatching a $1 million Falcon 20 owned by a debtor he has a long, rocky history with. Mike Kennedy is called in to repo a Cessna 208 Caravan used in the illegal trafficking of exotic animals.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo 911
programme.desc: Kevin poses as an interviewer to gain access to a Westwind jet, Ken and Danny valet a car to get the keys to a Cessna CJ3, and Mike repos an air ambulance, but not before he rescues their final lifesaving mission.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Narrow Escape
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy braves gators in the Florida night to snatch a party boy's Cessna Float plane. Kevin Lacy enrols a vengeful divorcé for a high-altitude, high-risk heist in Colorado and Ken and Danny have a close encounter with an angry debtor's shovel.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: The Hits Keep Coming
programme.desc: A dockhand hopes his sea legs will keep him steady. A deputy sheriff lays down the law.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Fight, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Kenny wants Armando to answer an important question. Tim braces for a sit-down with Melyza's father. Brittany is shocked when Yazan gives her an ultimatum, and joy turns into terrifying chaos as Deavan and Jihoon move into their new apartment.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: Deavan's mom unleashes her fury. Sumit tells Jenny his parents are ready to meet. Kenny pressures Armando to announce their engagement to his family. Ari and Bini clash over religion. Brittany is scared to face Yazan's parents again.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Armando's first attempt at PDA ends badly. Ari questions living in Ethiopia after her mom leaves. Deavan attempts to improve her relationship with Jihoon's mom. Tim has a troubling job interview. Brittany and Yazan clash over her social media.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: B90 Strikes Back!: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Lisa and Usman find common ground while Ed and Rosemarie enjoy some alone time. Later, Stephanie meets Erika's parents and Geoffrey and Varya have a spa day. Plus, Darcey says goodbye, while David plans an investigation.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Ari hits her breaking point. Elicia doesn't want to leave Korea without Deavan. Armando prepares for Kenny and his family to meet. Brittany continues to lie to Yazan. Tim drops a bomb on Melyza. Sumit goes to confront his parents about Jenny.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: The Truth Hurts

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: If This RV's 'a-Rockin
programme.desc: Before the Johnstons attend their annual little people's conference in San Francisco, Trent and Amber decide to start the trip in San Diego drive up in an RV.

programme.title: Princess Diana: Tragedy or Treason?
programme.desc: When Princess Diana's life was cut short by a tragic car accident, the entire world mourned her loss. Now, 20 years after her death shed some light on the life and death of one of history's most beloved figures.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Chris and Antoinette
programme.desc: Chris tries to get 700 donation items for $0. Single mother Antoinette coupons to take care of her mother and daughter.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Amber and Amanda
programme.desc: Amber Flores feeds her family of six on $50 a week. Amanda tries to best her own couponing record.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: J'aime and Tiffany

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Judy and Faatima
programme.desc: Faatima is couponing in order to move her family out of their dangerous neighbourhood in Detroit. Judy uses couponing to help her family and friends.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Jeff and Kelly
programme.desc: Jeff is passing the couponing torch to his son. Kelly is couponing for her basketball team's post game party.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Perry and Melissa
programme.desc: Perry raises her family on a vegan diet using coupons. Melissa takes her coupon-skeptic brother to get groceries to donate to the Ronald McDonald House.

programme.desc: Bonnie and the ladies help Tammy prepare for her first date since getting out of prison. Also, in order to take the edge off, Christy revisits one of her old vices.

programme.title: Mom: Hacky Sack and a Beautiful Experience
programme.desc: Christy’s smoking causes problems when the ladies take a road trip. Also, Bonnie offers Adam unsolicited business advice.

programme.title: Mom: Big Floor Pillows and a Ball of Fire
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie are suspicious when Adam’s best friend, Mitch, returns, insisting he’s a changed man.

programme.title: Mom: Kalamazoo and a Bad Wedge of Brie
programme.desc: Christy’s plan to win her sponsor’s approval backfires, and the ladies rush in to help after Jill’s house is broken into.

programme.title: George Lopez: Landlord Almighty
programme.desc: When Carmen grows tired of the house rules and remodels her room without her parents' consent, George grants her request for independence by charging her living expenses.

programme.title: George Lopez: George of the Rings
programme.desc: When George forgets his wedding anniversary, he promises Angie they'll renew their vows.

programme.title: George Lopez: Sk8r Boyz
programme.desc: Max gets in trouble with the law when he starts hanging out with a gang of skateboarders.

programme.title: Full House: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jesse is stuck in a tree and late for his wedding when he falls into a tomato truck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Growth Spout/ Stuck in the Wringer
programme.desc: Pearl goes through a growth spurt; after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a White Wolf/ Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis, accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into... crocodiles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Nursery Rhymes/ Digger World
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their best nursery rhymes. Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to Digger World, where they build walls and knock them over again. Peppa takes Teddy to Miss Rabbit's Doll Hospital.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Story Time With Blue
programme.desc: We are almost ready to read, but first we need to play Blue's Clues to figure out Blue's favourite story. While looking for clues, we help Shovel & Pail act out 'Jack & Jill' and match the three bears with their belongings.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Skydivers/ Pups Save the Cupcakes
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway and Farmer Al are ready for a day filled with skydiving fun. Alex and the Mini Patrol get locked inside the flounder.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: The Running of the Bullfrogs!
programme.desc: Gil and Goby bring a tadpole named Fernando to school to watch him grow into a frog. When Fernando’s ready to hop, Gil and Goby will have to lead him back to his pond in the traditional Running of the Bullfrogs!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Snow Squad to the Rescue
programme.desc: When someone's stealing sleeping bags from campers, Gil is convinced a yeti is to blame.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Flying Lion
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are excited to play with their new friend Roarian, the Flying Lion, but when Roarian loses his magical sunstone, he turns into a statue.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Midnight Mile
programme.desc: It may be nighttime in Axle City, but all the trucks are staying up super late for the ultimate all-night race.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Giant Chicken/ Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
programme.desc: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers. The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a giant chicken and the town.The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups and the Big Twin Trick/ Pups Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own. Mayor Humdinger finally gets super powers, and it's a total cat-astrophe.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Copycat
programme.desc: The Mighty Pups get Charged Up to take on The Copycat, their most formidable foe to date.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot / Mighty Pu
programme.desc: Harold Humdinger uses a giant robot to make his own town. The copycat is back and Adventure Bay need a mighty rescue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Life Insurance/ Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one. Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob Meets the Strangler/ Pranks a Lot
programme.desc: SpongeBob turns in the littering Tattletale Strangler; SpongeBob and Patrick invest in a local prank shop's magic 'invisible spray'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Escaping Catastrophe

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Snake Bites and Quicksand
programme.desc: Examining the possibilities of surviving an encounter with quicksand, as well as what to do if bitten by a rattlesnake. Also featuring footage of giant hurricanes, capsized boats and much more.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Desert Heat
programme.desc: Celebrating their anniversary Rick and Cathy hiked a trail in the Texas desert. They lost track of their location and became dehydrated quickly. Cathy becomes unable to move and Rick becomes their only hope to survive.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Animal Attacks

programme.title: Storage Wars: They'll Always Have Perris
programme.desc: The valley of Perris, CA hosts an early morning auction that has the buyers waking up early and watching their bids.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tinseltown Tussle
programme.desc: North Hollywood sets the scene for another auction filled with dreams of hitting it big. Mary gets a leg up on the competition with a not so secret weapon.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Ivy for the Win
programme.desc: The stakes are high and the dollars get higher as the buyers attend a first class auction in Arcadia, CA. Dave targets Jarrod and Brandi and the sparks begin to fly.

programme.title: Storage Wars: High Stakes and Low Blows
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, home to some of the biggest finds and worst dramas. Ivy has never hit it big here so he is focused on a good score no matter the cost. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi are determined to not let another big locker get away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Valley of the Hauls
programme.desc: Moreno Valley, California, is a bit out of the way, but any auction could have the hidden treasure that keeps the buyers on the hunt. Mary decides it is time to take matters into her own hands and launches a daring idea, while Ivy keeps it old school.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Like It Hotter
programme.desc: A few locals give Rene a run for his money, but that doesn't stop Mary from bidding beyond her budget.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock the Vote!
programme.desc: Ivy comes across a cross-dressing locker while Jarrod and Brandi have good history in the area and hope for another score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Bid and No Bite
programme.desc: The day starts rough, but nothing can stop the hunt for treasure as the buyers head to Rancho Palos Verdes, CA. Mary has to stay on a budget and learns a hard lesson about Dave. Rene tries a secret strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Just Deserts
programme.desc: Ivy uses a dastardly tactic to rouse the competition as the auction forces Mary to travel well out of her comfort zone. Rene steps up his game, while Darrell tries to score despite Brandon's sour mood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auctions and Allies
programme.desc: The buyers return to Koreatown for an auction near the heart of Los Angeles. In order to score a good locker, Brandi is forced to keep an eye out for more shenanigans from Jarrod. Ivy and Mary form an unexpected alliance.

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: Bow Hunting Blues
programme.desc: Steve and Steph believe an extra box was sent to them by mistake, Heather and Pastor Paul fear they've purchased a used bidet, and Chuck and Chris take a risk on a shipment of high-end hunting bows.

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: Keyboard for Cash
programme.desc: Bobby and Salena challenge each other to a contest after receiving two mystery boxes, Joe purchases an electric keyboard but Jessica fears it's a shipment of toilet paper, and Blake and Max buy 1600 book returns.

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: Risky Business
programme.desc: Steve and Steph take a risk on a shipment of safety equipment, Heather and Pastor Paul receive a shipment of broken furniture, and Chuck and Chris buy a bulk order of bug zappers.

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: Gut Feelings
programme.desc: Bobby and Salena's shipment of returned sleeping bags leaves them in the cold, Jessica's 'gut feeling' for an orange rug may be a total bust, and Blake and Max must fix a defective scooter.

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: What's in the Box
programme.desc: Bobby and Salena, Chuck and Chris, and Steve and Steph unbox hundreds of items searching for retail gold, ranging from expensive Lego sets, a La Creuset Dutch oven, and a box of slime.

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: In the Army Now
programme.desc: Heather and Pastor Paul enlist a local vendor to buy a shipment of army surplus, Steve and Steph set their sights on a high definition gun scope, and Chuck and Chris try to rack up the profit with a pool table.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Downtown Lockers and Uptown Dreams
programme.desc: An auction challenges the buyers to find a score in a tower of lockers in downtown Los Angeles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The School of Hard Knock-Knocks

programme.title: Storage Wars: There's No Business Like Snow Business
programme.desc: Mary weathers the storm with gusto as Casey tries to keep Rene's eyes on the prize. Ivy doesn't let the cold weather freeze him out and goes on a buying spree, while Dave tries to heat things up.

programme.title: Storage Wars: From Dust 'Til Dawn
programme.desc: The desert country of Mojave, California, hosts a rough auction where the buyers have to dig deep to find value.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine
programme.desc: The charter guests request a White Party for their final dinner, and Ben goes to great lengths in creating a menu for the theme. Joao's ego gets him in hot water with Captain Sandy, while Jack enlists the crew to help him ask Aesha to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Love, Love Me Stew
programme.desc: The crew prepares for the final chapter of the season, and with Joao sidelined with a fever, Travis is forced to step up. Bad weather rolls into the south of France leaving Sirocco stuck at the dock, adding more pressure on the interior team to perform.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Au Revoir, Sirocco
programme.desc: A boat catches fire in port stranding Sirocco with nowhere to go. The interior team grows resentful of Sandy's harsh criticisms, while Jack and Aesha contemplate their future off the boat.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sunday Supper
programme.desc: After a morning spent in church, Kardea Brown invites her family over for a scrumptiously southern Sunday supper. She serves up a few of her family's favourites for dinner, including fried chicken po' boys and her grandma's crab mac and cheese.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Picnic in the Park
programme.desc: Kardea picnics in the park with friends and her favourite one-hand wonders like rotisserie chicken salad sandwiches with homemade bacon jam and chilled black-eyed pea salad. The lunch finishes with delicious blackberry hand pies.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Beach Blanket Country Boil

programme.desc: When Michael claims he's too sick to go to school, Debra enlists Ray's parental aid.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Misery Loves Company
programme.desc: Blissful newlyweds Robert and Amy try to offer Debra and Ray some marital advice.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Contractor
programme.desc: Ray's lazy contractor friend gets Debra burning mad when he tries to replace their stove.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Rode a Hoverboard!
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and exaggerates at school that he fell off of a hover board just like in the 'Back to the Future' movie.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Most Handsome Boy on the Planet
programme.desc: When Barry is approached by a modeling representative in the mall, Barry is convinced he’ll be famous but Erica believes it's a scam so Beverly threatens the modeling rep to give him a gig or else.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Everyone Says I Love You Except Ritchie
programme.desc: When Ritchie stops telling Christine he loves her, she asks Richard to have a baby with her so she can have a new child to love her, the way Ritchie once did.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Tie Me Up, Don't Tie Me Down
programme.desc: Barb and Christine prepare for a casual, non-relationship-seeking double date, but jealousy arises when one date goes better than the other.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Self-Esteem Tempura
programme.desc: Christine is thrilled when a talent scout recruits Ritchie to audition for a television commercial after his shockingly great performance in a school play but Richard refuses to let him go.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Rage Against the Christine
programme.desc: After Christine wins at tennis against her new boyfriend, he has a surprisingly odd reaction to her competitiveness.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: The Last Hunt
programme.desc: With the Constructor dead in the water, it's up to Otto and his crew of family and friends to save the invaluable boat for future use. Eivin takes novice hunter Levi on a last chance hunt to Shuyak Island to stockpile deer meat for winter.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Biting Back
programme.desc: Heimo tests his trapping skills on both land and water to outsmart one of his favorite catches, beaver. Scott puts lessons learned to the test as he tracks marten. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Laying Down Their Legacy
programme.desc: Scrambling to finish trapping season, Heimo discovers the best catch of the season: a wolf. Charlie walks a legend's footsteps as he works the traplines Bob left to him. Tyler takes on the challenge of getting their hunting cabin ready for next season.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Heimo's Big Hunt
programme.desc: Heimo is determined to experience the caribou migration, while a bear invades Bob's cabin. On a hunt, Bob's boat is threatened and the Seldens come home to a flooded cabin.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Poison, Predators and Death Traps
programme.desc: The Raneys race to save a couple struggling against poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague that looms their Arizona homestead. Then, the Raneys face their first-ever failed rescue when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Heimo's Big Hunt
programme.desc: Heimo is determined to experience the caribou migration, while a bear invades Bob's cabin. On a hunt, Bob's boat is threatened and the Seldens come home to a flooded cabin.

programme.desc: The Raneys race to save a couple struggling against poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague that looms their Arizona homestead. Then, the Raneys face their first-ever failed rescue when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Biting Back
programme.desc: Heimo tests his trapping skills on both land and water to outsmart one of his favorite catches, beaver. Scott puts lessons learned to the test as he tracks marten. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Laying Down Their Legacy
programme.desc: Scrambling to finish trapping season, Heimo discovers the best catch of the season: a wolf. Charlie walks a legend's footsteps as he works the traplines Bob left to him. Tyler takes on the challenge of getting their hunting cabin ready for next season.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Steve
programme.desc: Bindi swims alongside whale sharks, assisting with research efforts on the world's latest and least understood fish. Robert work to save an echidna that's tightly trapped under a fridge. Terri joins a closeup exam on a grizzly.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Road Trip Rescue
programme.desc: Carrying three baby kangaroos and an emu, the Irwins caravan into the Australian Outback to release the animals on Mourachan, their giant wildlife conservation property. Plans shift when they discover more animals in need of rescue along the way.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Penguins in Love
programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Momma's Surprise
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack that will help them investigate why. Big Mama the guitarfish may be living up to her name, and the boa-duo Ripley and Ridley receive a new home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Colombian Dinosaur
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Colombia, Forrest is on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. Locals believe this crocodilian resides within a lawless land inhabited by guerilla rebels, kidnappers, and deadly predators.

programme.desc: The black proprietor of an after-hours club in 1930s Harlem tries to stand up to a mobster.

programme.desc: A couple jumped at the chance to buy the quaint house next door, loving its large lot and three-car garage. They thought they could handle updating the interior, but they're overwhelmed by the amount of work it requires.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Greg and Rodolfo's Change of Heart
programme.desc: Hilary and David reminisce about homeowners Greg and Rodolfo, and wonder how their parties are panning out in the new pool palace David found for them. They also speculate if Hilary's beautiful basement design lead to any second-guessing.

programme.title: Love It or List It: 1970s Drab to Fab
programme.desc: Homeowners must decide between renovating or selling their house.

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia: Queenslander Quandary
programme.desc: Five years after a couple bought their home, he is over the constant maintenance while she feels it has good bones. Neale seeks a solution to their lack of living space, and Andrew searches for a move-in ready home that will make them both want to list.

programme.title: Love It or List It: An Artful Promise
programme.desc: Bert and Tommy share Tommy's eclectic, 1980s contemporary home, but Bert wants a home that reflects them both. The couple loves to entertain and host visiting artists and friends, but Bert feels the house is dated, and lacks space and function.

programme.desc: Homeowners must decide between renovating or selling their house.

programme.desc: Five years after a couple bought their home, he is over the constant maintenance while she feels it has good bones. Neale seeks a solution to their lack of living space, and Andrew searches for a move-in ready home that will make them both want to list.

programme.desc: Bert and Tommy share Tommy's eclectic, 1980s contemporary home, but Bert wants a home that reflects them both. The couple loves to entertain and host visiting artists and friends, but Bert feels the house is dated, and lacks space and function.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Greg and Rodolfo's Change of Heart
programme.desc: Hilary and David reminisce about homeowners Greg and Rodolfo, and wonder how their parties are panning out in the new pool palace David found for them. They also speculate if Hilary's beautiful basement design lead to any second-guessing.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Income Property
programme.desc: Becky and Junior want to make their income property home.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Blended Family
programme.desc: Sue and her son used to live alone in this 1100 square foot house. Ten years after squeezing in Bruce and his two grown kids, Bruce is ready to pack his bags, and stretch his legs in a bigger house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Dog Pound to Showstopper
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol get a lead on a home in the family-friendly suburb of Henderson that's too good of a deal to pass up. However, they barely make it through the front door before being overwhelmed by the smell of dog urine.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Bank-Owned Disaster
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol take a chance on a disastrous Las Vegas townhouse with bugs, water damage, and more.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Nod to Mid-century Mod
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol check out a two-bedroom house that just hit the Las Vegas market.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Vegas Beach House
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol take a three-bedroom house in as-is condition from a woman who needs to sell quickly. They set out to create an open dining and living space, use hardwood flooring on the ceiling, freshen up the pool and give it a beach theme.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Cottage Glam
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol purchase a starter home in Las Vegas, and while it may be a small house, buyers expect the best in this town. Aubrey uses custom finishes built by Bristol to deck out the home and give it a glam-farmhouse style.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Short Sale Home Gets High-End Flip
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol buy a house site unseen for $250,000 in west Vegas. The ranch-style home is in an upscale neighborhood with comps around $400,000, but the dull and dated property will need a high-end overhaul to turn a profit.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Design Nightmare
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol take on one of their biggest challenges ever when a woman's 3,200-square-foot, four bedroom, three bathroom home hits the market at a price considerably lower than comps in the area.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Bristol's Rustic Retreat
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol swap jobs as they renovate a Vegas townhouse, with Aubrey handling the home's construction and Bristol creating a design plan that will give the rooms a rustic feel. Later they make time to attend a charity event at Caesar's Palace.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Bold Blue Condo
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol jump at the opportunity to flip a condo just off the Vegas Strip. A unit that is in desperate need for an update, Aubrey chooses a bold design featuring navy blue walls and white wainscoting in the living room.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: From Bank Owned to Industrial Vegas Glam
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol head back to the neighborhood where they flipped their first property together to check out a bank-owned home.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Duplex Dilemma
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol purchase a small duplex and decide to convert it into a single-family home with a fun design theme inspired by Aubrey's college days. The project is finalized with a total redo of the home's facade to include an A-frame entrance.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: 1980s Golf Club Home
programme.desc: When a homeowner that lives out of the country wants to get a house off his hands, Aubrey and Bristol jump at the chance to buy and transform the home in an exclusive golf club community.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Historical Headache
programme.desc: A tip from a friend lands Alison and Donovan one of the first landmarked cottages in the Ukrainian Village of Chicago. They hope to restore it to its former glory, but strict historical build guidelines and expensive property loss hamper plans.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Bucktown Rebuild
programme.desc: Alison Victoria buys a rundown historic home in the heart of Chicago. This Windy City home comes with many surprises, however, and when the house unexpectedly has to be taken down to the studs.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Alison Victoria wants to give a neglected Bucktown home an upscale, English-style makeover. However, she faces a tough financial decision when a potential buyer makes a full-price offer that requires her to change the entire design.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Fire Sale Fail to Dream Duplex
programme.desc: While looking for a property in Wicker Park, Alison and Donovan discover what seems like a great deal on an 1885 triplex with fire damage. Even as they start picking out pieces for it, hidden structural damage from the fire starts burning up profits.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Roof-raising Race for Space
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan are back in Chicago's Bucktown neighbourhood, where they find a Civil War-era house on a corner lot with only 1,200 square feet of living space.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Neighbor
programme.desc: A recently separated father and his teenage daughter become the deadly obsession of their neighbour, a beguiling, deranged young woman willing to do whatever's necessary to take her rightful place as their wife and mother.

programme.title: Movie: The Neighbor in the Window
programme.desc: After a woman moves to Washington to start a new life with her husband, she realizes her new neighbour is not what she seems.

programme.desc: Tracy travels to Dubai to earn a listing that could change her life, and hangs with friend and local celeb Caroline Stanbury. Altman hunts down a mystery property in Malibu to house dozens of luxury cars for an important client.

programme.desc: James and David throw a "Great Gatsby" themed open house in an effort to sell a Bel Air estate on a tight timeline. Tracy launches her Dubai high-rise to an L.A. crowd, hoping to drum up international interest. Flagg and Altman must work together.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman and Flagg's Co-List
programme.desc: Sworn enemies Altman and Flagg team up and hit the road in hopes of landing a major listing in La Jolla. Tracy gets creative to sell a Hollywood Hills artists enclave. James and David hit the hiking trails of LA to garner interest in a historic bungalow.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Ze Plane, Ze Plane!

programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Twister, Sister
programme.desc: When Booker challenges Nia's efforts as an activist, she follows her dad to where he's reporting on a storm to prove to herself and her brother that she is indeed an activist and not a "positivist."

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friend-Ship
programme.desc: Raven and the kids plan a road trip to visit Chelsea at her cruise ship and encounter several obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea
programme.desc: The kids accidentally get stuck on a cruise ship alone, while Raven and Chelsea desperately try to catch up with them via Jet Ski.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diss Track
programme.desc: Nia, Tess and Booker are ecstatic over the popularity of their Chi-Lective music video that has gotten thousands of likes on MeTube, until Levi shows them a diss track that’s been posted by a rival group.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One
programme.desc: While on vacation, the Ross family finds a girl stranded in the middle of the ocean and invites her aboard their yacht. Meanwhile, Bertram stays home and babysits Mrs. Kipling, who has separation anxiety from Ravi.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Two
programme.desc: While exploring an Italian island, the Ross family's tour guide tells a story about Jessie's necklace, and how its curse brings anyone who wears it bad luck in love.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Three
programme.desc: Jessie abruptly ends the Ross family vacation because the kids are constantly fighting. They wind up in a pickle when they find the yacht the next morning floating in the middle of the sea with no captain or crew in sight.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Father of the Bribe
programme.desc: Sydney is excited when she makes the school's first girls' fencing team. But when she learns her dad helped Coach Carlock, Sydney fears she may have gotten on the team for the wrong reason.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Sister Pact
programme.desc: Sydney and her friends make a pact to go to the dance together without dates. She finds herself in a pickle when Ned asks her to the dance. Max recalls his first school dance when Leo and his mom gave him tips on how to ask a girl to be his date.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny
programme.desc: Jessie accepts a job as a nanny and moves in with the Ross family: Christina, a former supermodel turned business mogul; Morgan, a famous movie director; their four kids Emma, Ravi, Luke and Zuri and their beloved Asian water monitor lizard.

programme.title: Jessie: The Princess and the Pea Brain
programme.desc: Fairy tales come alive when Jessie and Zuri read a bedtime story that places the gang in medieval times. Jessie is excited and Tony is jealous when Brody asks her on a date.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Welcome to Camp Kikiwaka
programme.desc: The Ross kids arrive at camp, only to discovery that the camp's owner, Gladys, is even scarier than the legendary creature that's rumoured to stalk the grounds. With the help of her sneaky niece Hazel, she's out to get the Ross kids.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part One: Frozen
programme.desc: When Booker freezes mid-vision, Raven takes him to Dr. Sleevemore, the same doctor who helped her when she was a teen.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part Two: Found
programme.desc: When Nia discovers that Booker’s visions went into her eye, Tess convinces her to keep the visions for the next couple of weeks.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: BFF-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When South, Liv's best friend from Hollywood visits, Maddie becomes jealous of South's flirtations with Diggie.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Song-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv's latest single becomes a viral video for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Beauties and Bullies
programme.desc: Trish lands the lead role in the school play, but when she reads mean-spirited online comments, she wants to quit the production. Austin and Ally write a special song for Trish to help her understand that she's not alone.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Videos and Villains
programme.desc: Video Countdown Live features Austin Moon's top ten videos which culminates in a live performance from Austin, however, the gang must rescue him from Brooke who is holding him captive.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lake Rancid
programme.desc: When a magazine contacts Destiny to do a story on her community service, Matteo, Gwen, and Finn help her clean only one area of the shore, hiding the rest of the trash.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Inn Trouble
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka gets a surprise visitor...Hazel! Hazel says she's changed, so Lou agrees to let her hang out for a few days. The boys attempt to earn the camp’s highest honour.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mystery of the Secret Room/ The Mystery of the Magnificent Musicians
programme.desc: When Mira and her friends get stuck in a hidden room in the palace, it's up to her to find a way out. When some of the townspeople's musical instruments go missing before a big music jam, Mira must find out what happened.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Big Little Baby / The Super Secret Mission
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Bad Ear Day
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Timebreaker
programme.desc: After Alix's friends break her father’s priceless watch, she is akumatized into Timebreaker.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Pharaoh
programme.desc: A young historian gets akumatized into the all-powerful Pharaoh. He wants to bring an Ancient Egyptian princess back to life by sacrificing Alya. To save her, Ladybug and Cat Noir must face an army of mummies outside the Louvre!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Mr. Pigeon
programme.desc: When park keepers banish him from feeding the pigeons, Mr. Ramier is transformed as Mr. Pigeon. Now able to communicate with the birds, he kidnaps the keepers and begins plans to turn Paris into a nature reserve for his bird friends.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Bunk'd: O Sister, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Ravi helps Matteo overcome his fears using hypnosis, but Matteo's newfound confidence could get him into trouble.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Cav'd In
programme.desc: After Matteo and Finn express their frustration with Ravi's spying, Ravi decides to use a drone to spy on them instead.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sorry to Father You
programme.desc: When Raven and Chelsea go on a weekend getaway to celebrate the anniversary of their friendship, the kids are left at home in the care of both Devon and Garrett.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Foreign Identity
programme.desc: When Nia develops a crush on the new French exchange student, Timothée, she pretends to be a sophisticated Brit to win him over and enlists Booker to help her keep up the ruse.

programme.title: Bunk'd: By All Memes
programme.desc: Emma decides to give everyone back their cell phones to foster camp unity and bring everyone closer together on her new Campstagram App.

programme.title: Bunk'd: A Whole Lotta Lobsta
programme.desc: Ross and the kids are determined to make the Kikiwaka lobster festival great.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Startrain

programme.desc: Mrs. Mendeleiev gets akumatized into Kwamibuster. She wants to capture Tikki and Plagg to prove to the world that these magic creatures are real. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to protect their secret at all costs.

programme.desc: After a private jet's passengers and crew travelling from New Orleans to Washington, D.C., are lethally poisoned, all evidence points to the missing chef, Abby's brother, Luca. Gibbs and the team work in conjunction with Pride and the New Orleans team.

programme.title: NCIS: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury, the NCIS team uncovers the resurgence of an international human trafficking ring. Also, McGee hopes to spend the night at a colleague's home after a power outage.
