programme.desc: When a petty officer's murder matches the M.O. of a local serial killer, the NCIS team must determine if this is the killer's latest victim or the work of a copycat. Also, McGee and Delilah must learn to compromise before moving in together.

programme.title: NCIS: 16 Years
programme.desc: The NCIS murder case of a retired Navy Lieutenant Commander forces Ducky to reveal his participation in a secret society that solves cold cases.

programme.title: NCIS: Saviors
programme.desc: DiNozzo is reunited with his ex-girlfriend, Jeanne Benoit, when insurgents in Sudan attack a group of volunteer doctors, including her husband. DiNozzo and McGee travel to the crime scene for the joint murder and kidnapping case.

programme.title: NCIS: Day in Court
programme.desc: In order to clear his name, a petty officer volunteers to be court martialed if NCIS agrees to conduct its own investigation after his murder case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant. Also, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems.

programme.title: NCIS: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: In the hopes of sparing a family further tragedy, the Secretary of the Navy calls on NCIS to help a sailor battling leukemia locate a bone marrow transplant. Also, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for the Thanksgiving holiday.

programme.title: NCIS: Spinning Wheel
programme.desc: After Ducky is attacked by a man claiming to have information about his half-brother who died decades ago, the team searches for the perpetrator. Also, with the holidays approaching, Bishop and Jake discuss the future of their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: Sister City
programme.desc: After a private jet's passengers and crew travelling from New Orleans to Washington, D.C., are lethally poisoned, all evidence points to the missing chef, Abby's brother, Luca. Gibbs and the team work in conjunction with Pride and the New Orleans team.

programme.title: NCIS: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury, the NCIS team uncovers the resurgence of an international human trafficking ring. Also, McGee hopes to spend the night at a colleague's home after a power outage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Faith
programme.desc: A publisher is killed after demanding to see the crippled girl he has supported.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Badge
programme.desc: The murder of a city auditor and his family leads to a corrupt group of former officers.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Tuxedo Hill
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, detectives uncover a financial scandal linked to the crime.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Stepping Stone
programme.desc: The Intelligence unit investigates a string of murders linked to a Colombian drug cartel. Meanwhile, a rookie is pulled from the police academy to join the team.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Wrong Side of the Bars
programme.desc: Antonio's son was kidnapped, and he has a feeling the Columbian drug gang is to blame. The Columbian gang leader is being held in jail and suggests his release may trigger the release of Diego.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chin Check
programme.desc: After the discovery of large amounts of cop killer ammo, the Intelligence Unit is in a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now Is Always Temporary
programme.desc: The intelligence squad is in hot pursuit of a counterfeiting ring as Atwater and Burgess come across something unexpected in a hoarder's home.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Thirty Balloons
programme.desc: A run in with a psychotic woman leads the Intelligence Unit to discover a drug smuggling operation which has put several lives in peril.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Conventions
programme.desc: Voight and Antonio enlist the agents of the Special Victims Unit to help track down the culprit of a series of rapes and murders. Burgess has the opportunity to prove herself to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Price We Pay
programme.desc: Tensions between Voight and Antonio builds as Internal Affairs digs into a murder case which potentially involves Voight's son.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Turn the Light Off
programme.desc: Voight and the team discover a massacre, eight-million in cash stolen and two wounded men cleaning house. During questioning, one guy provides some key intel that leads Antonio to realize that two gangs were involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 8:30
programme.desc: Conclusion, the Intelligence Unit works to find the bombers. Even with the government agencies in the mix, Voight and his team work the case from their own angles and connections. Lindsay and Antonio question doctors who handled a transplant surgery.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: My Way
programme.desc: Commander Perry notifies the Intelligence Unit that Pulpo has been released to help track down a dangerous cartel leader. Meanwhile, Ruzek gets some difficult news as a blast from Lindsay's past comes back.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Stepping Stone
programme.desc: The Intelligence unit investigates a string of murders linked to a Colombian drug cartel. Meanwhile, a rookie is pulled from the police academy to join the team.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Former IMF agent Ethan Hunt is on a new mission. He must rescue a fellow agent from dangerous arms dealer Owen Davian. Hunt must rely on a new cast of agents and some old friends to help save the day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Meets Curl
programme.desc: The Simpsons head to the 2010 Vancouver Games. Marge and Homer take up curling and end up competing in the Olympic trials. Meanwhile, Lisa becomes hopelessly addicted to collecting Olympic pins.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Color Yellow
programme.desc: Lisa discovers that her Southern ancestors helped a slave, Virgil, escape to freedom and presents her family's story during Black History Month.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Postcards From the Wedge
programme.desc: When Bart fails to turn in his homework, Mrs. Krabappel sends a letter home about Bart's behaviour. Despite Bart's best efforts to intercept it, Homer reads the letter, and he and Marge visit Principal Skinner for a parent-teacher conference.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Stealing First Base
programme.desc: Principal Skinner announces that Mrs. Krabappel was called out of town and budget cuts dictate that, until she returns, the school's two fourth grade classes will merge. Bart reluctantly shares a desk with Nikki and develops a flirtatious rapport.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Greatest Story Ever D'Ohed
programme.desc: When Homer is playing noisily in the yard, it disrupts Flanders' bible study group. Coaxed by the reverend, a frustrated Flanders takes it upon himself to redeem Homer by inviting the Simpson family on his church retreat to Jerusalem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: American History X-cellent
programme.desc: When the police are called to diffuse a rowdy crowd at Mr. Burns' estate, one of the officers recognizes priceless stolen paintings on the walls, and the maniacal billionaire is taken downtown for questioning.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Chief of Hearts
programme.desc: Homer is completing his court-ordered community service when he befriends his supervisor, Chief Wiggum, by offering him a sandwich. Touched by the act of kindness, Wiggum assigns the other convicts unpleasant tasks, but allows Homer to join him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Letter Blues
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, Moe narrates an episode in which he writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are vacationing with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Bob Next Door
programme.desc: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour, Walt, is his archenemy Sideshow Bob disguised and back for revenge. But when Marge tries to convince Bart otherwise by taking him to visit the state penitentiary, a disturbing truth is revealed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Judge Me Tender
programme.desc: When Moe discovers a hidden talent for judging contests, he is approached by a television agent to join the 'American Idol' judges' panel. Moe flies to Los Angeles where he tours the Fox lot and receives some sage career advice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: When Krusty the Clown is announced as the recipient of the Nobel Peace Prize, Homer invites Bart to accompany him on a trip to Oslo for the ceremony. Sensing that Lisa would feel left out, Marge surprises her with a retreat at performing arts camp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Loan-a-Lisa
programme.desc: Grampa gives each member of the family a portion of his savings. Lisa invests in Nelson's new business venture, but realizes that his instant success might lure him away from the classroom.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac's Mom Burns Her House Down
programme.desc: Charlie and Mac set-up a truly odd couple after Mac's Mom burns the house down, while Frank discovers the importance of paternal care when Dee falls ill.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Who Got Dee Pregnant?
programme.desc: The gang gets a real 'scare' after Dee reveals she's pregnant, forcing the guys to recall their last hazy Halloween party to determine if one of them might be the father.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets a New Member
programme.desc: A blast from the past prompts the guys to expand membership, and Dee to re-consider her future.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Kelly: King of the Rats
programme.desc: When keeping the basement rodent-free drives Charlie to the brink, the gang decides to put the cynicism aside and throw a surprise party to cheer him up.

programme.title: Mom: Mahjong Sally and the Ecstasy
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie don't know who to believe when they hear conflicting stories about Violet and Gregory's break-up.

programme.title: Mom: Atticus Finch and the Downtrodden

programme.title: Mom: High-Tops and Brown Jacket

programme.title: Mom: Sword Fights and a Dominican Shortstop

programme.title: Movie: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A boy wakes up in an ascending elevator with no memory of who he is or how he got there. He joins a group of other boys trapped in an enclosed area surrounded by an enormous maze. His only hope for escape is by piecing together clues about his past.

programme.title: Movie: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials
programme.desc: Having escaped the Maze, the Gladers face even greater challenges as they traverse a desolate and dangerous wasteland in a world ravaged by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Movie: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: A group of youths sets out to rescue their friends from the legendary Last City, a dangerous place that turns out to be the deadliest maze that they've faced it. Only those who survive the ordeal will finally get answers to their burning questions.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Planet Earth: A Celebration
programme.desc: This program highlights eight of the most extraordinary sequences from 'Planet Earth II' and 'Blue Planet II.' In addition to new narration, the sequences will include an arrangement of original scores from composer Hans Zimmer and Jacob Shea.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Enchanted Kingdom

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Galapagos
programme.desc: Travel to the most famous archipelago on Earth, the Galapagos. The islands are home bizarre and unique creatures.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Meet a pitbull who can do tricks, but has no social skills, and a dachshund mix showing food aggression.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bulldog on the Edge
programme.desc: Cesar contends with one of his toughest cases, a 'red-zone' aggressive American bulldog named Bella.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar and the Horse Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar and horse whisperer Pat saves the day when they help Joan with animal struggles.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: K-9 Phobia
programme.desc: Actress Eileen Davidson of 'The Young and the Restless' seeks help with her terrier.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Chihuahuas From Hell
programme.desc: Cesar must handle a very angry Chihuahua known to scare the pit bulls of the pound.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: It's Raining Hen
programme.desc: Popeye the rabbit comes to the Pol Clinic with overgrown teeth, and leaves with a couple of dates. Popeye's owner, Jodi, is raising money for her therapeutic riding organization, Hopewell Ranch.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Ruff Day at the Office
programme.desc: It’s ready, set, VET as Dr. Pol and the other vets race to take on emergency after emergency in one frantic Friday.

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Savanna Smackdown
programme.desc: Revealing what happens when Africa's wildest animals turn on their own kind, and brings you closer than ever before to the toughest and meanest fights on the savannah's unforgiving battleground.

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Rumble in the USA
programme.desc: Nat Geo WILD reveals what happens when America's most iconic animals turn on their own kind and brings you closer than ever before to the most awesome and adrenaline-packed fights of the Wild West.

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Beach Brawl
programme.desc: Nat Geo WILD sails around the world to reveal what happens when nature's fiercest shore dwellers turn on their own kind, as we expose the coastline's toughest and meanest animal fights.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Ancient America
programme.desc: America before Columbus was home to some of the greatest engineering marvels on the planet. Special access to hi-tech archaeological digs reveals the secrets of ancient America's Seven Wonders as experts investigate their mysterious purposes.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of America
programme.desc: Seven American engineering marvels are among the modern wonders of United States, and now, investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Trapped on the ISS
programme.desc: Astronauts on the International Space Station are horrified to discover that a hole has been drilled into the craft's wall, and precious oxygen is pouring out into space; while everyone is busy pointing fingers, someone is trying to get away with murder.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: When Aliens Invade
programme.desc: When aliens invade Earth, scientists and experts have a plan to make contact; what they find may raise more questions than answers.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: When Aliens Invade
programme.desc: When aliens invade Earth, scientists and experts have a plan to make contact; what they find may raise more questions than answers.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: A Deceitful Heart
programme.desc: When Michael Lee Smith's body is found shot, partially nude, and dumped on the side of the road, the town of Berkley, Michigan is scandalized. Police are forced to sift through lies and alibis as they attempt to track down the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: New exclusive access and never before heard testimony gives a unique insight into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. Breathtaking archive from the time and the voice of Bundy himself, reveals the monster inside the man.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: New exclusive access and never before heard testimony gives a unique insight into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. Breathtaking archive from the time and the voice of Bundy himself, reveals the monster inside the man.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Tampa Bay Slayer: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby in high school, she never could have imagined what he would become: husband, father, serial killer.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Tampa Bay Slayer: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby in high school, she never could have imagined what he would become: husband, father, serial killer.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: New exclusive access and never before heard testimony gives a unique insight into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. Breathtaking archive from the time and the voice of Bundy himself, reveals the monster inside the man.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: New exclusive access and never before heard testimony gives a unique insight into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. Breathtaking archive from the time and the voice of Bundy himself, reveals the monster inside the man.

programme.title: Diabolical: When All Else Fails
programme.desc: After her home is invaded and her husband murdered, Shaunna Dodd recounts her harrowing ordeal at gunpoint. But when investigators dig deeper, they uncover a tale of lies, infidelity, and shady characters who have wandered into the Washoe Valley.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fireworks on Fury Lane
programme.desc: A firefighter moves into a family-friendly neighbourhood with his wife and child, but the rambunctious teens living next door drive him over the edge.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: My House, My Revenge
programme.desc: A couple moves to an idyllic California beach town and hits it off with their new neighbors. The wives are particularly friendly, until one of them descends into drugs and madness, terrorizing and turning murderous intent upon the other.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mailbox Madness
programme.desc: When someone new decides to build his dream home on a quiet street, neighbours take sides. Long-time friends become hard-core enemies, and death is just around the corner.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Is Different About Robbie
programme.desc: Though Ronald Hawkins and Candace Sims knew that their son Robbie was different from an early age, they were unprepared for the violent act that Robbie would commit, a crime that shook the nation. Now they talk about it all on camera.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secrets
programme.desc: Sean Lewis isn't surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, has been arrested again. But this time, Sean learns that every time he had helped his brother get out of some jam he was unwittingly helping a monster continue living a secret double life.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Firepower
programme.desc: In this action packed episode we see the secret device that will tear apart terrorist bombs; the new squad weapon that will get you out of an ambush; the latest surface to air missile and the US Army's latest sniper rifle.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.desc: A husband-wife duo decides to do most of the construction to save money on their first flip. He has some construction experience, but she's a total newbie and needs guidance, something he struggles to give when it means slowing them down.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a New Log Home for the Boy Scouts
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders volunteer to help Boy Scout troop 248 build a new lodge out of their old lodge. The boys' determination gives the Barnwood Builders something in return; hope for the future.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Reclaiming a One-Room Log Schoolhouse
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders go deep in the holler to reclaim a rare one-room log schoolhouse full of history. Back on the bone yard, the schoolhouse gets a whole new life.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding Grandma's Cabin in Montana
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel all the way to Montana to rebuild grandma's cabin from last season. They give the 150-year old home a whole new life as a cliff-side lodge. They explore the cabins of the wild west and enjoy some Montana ranch fun.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Restoring a Log Cabin in Pipe Stem, West Virginia
programme.desc: Mark and the guys restore an 1856 log cabin using wood from the original cabin, as well as wood from an old barn and a local saw mill. They team up with a local crew called, 'The Good Ole Boys,' to turn all this wood into one complete cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Wading With Alligators to Build a Two-Story Hunting Lodge in Florida
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the bones of an old Virginia log home down to Florida, where they turn it into a two-story hunting lodge. Mark makes mouth blown wavy glass for the windows, and dives in an alligator pond to get some long leaf pine for the floors.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael Jr. take things to the next level as they decide to go into business together. They purchase an outdated, suburban property and face a wonky layout, too many stairs and open-concept headaches.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael figure out the open-concept dilemma at the Suburban House and turn their attention outside, where their plans for a spacious new deck come up short. They must quickly find a solution before the fast-approaching open house arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wild Yeast Risin'
programme.desc: First the pandemic, then the zombies, then the nukes and now: desolation and a giant dinosaur-thing. Luckily there is still yeast in the air, and Alton proves that with a wild sourdough in the kitchen along with cheese crackers and waffles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Let Them Eat (Icebox) Cake
programme.desc: Alton resuscitates the languishing tradition of the 'icebox' or 'refrigerator' cake. These no-bake cakes were all the rage in the 1950s, but they’re ready for a pastry redux.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Take Stock: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show from 2003, creating a better, more flavourful, faster stock and then turning that into a chicken soup ... all in less than two hours ... the dish, not the show.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fry Hard II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic fried chicken episode with an all-new deep-fried recipe, an introduction to sumac and a look at the science of crunch.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: I Pie: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this episode on lemon meringue pie with a new crust, a new filling and a new meringue. He also bites the heads off of some puppets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet Sensations
programme.desc: Algonso gets a sweet sensation from treats like the iconic Sugar Daddy, colorful Warheads Chewy Cubes, and the luscious Milk Chocolate with Caramel Squares from Ghirardelli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Freaky Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso highlights snacks with some freaky flavors! From Upton's Naturals Bacon Seitan to the Smoked Nib Brittle from Olive and Sinclair, to Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers, these curious treats are good eats.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Summertime
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to roll out those lazy days of summer the right way with our favorite summertime dishes! He contemplates if ceviche is really cooked, whether gazpacho came from the Good Book and what the cake in strawberry shortcake is.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking us on a wild ride through the Windy City. He's going to determine if Chicago deep dish is definitely pizza, if brownies are just fancy fair food and he'll shed some light on saganaki's flames.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Deli-licious
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to fill our bellies with delicious dishes from the deli. He's checking out how the bagel met cream cheese and lox, why black and white cookies keep the gray away and when pastrami on rye first piled things high.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Layers of Flavours
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean layers it on thick as he digs into lovely layered feasts. He'll find out if club sandwiches were once for members only, how tiramisu tried to take coffee's job and why London may lay claim to lasagna.

programme.title: Good Eats: A Bowl of Onion
programme.desc: Alton Brown journeys to the center of the onion and after rediscovering a kitchen classic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hook, Line and Dinner
programme.desc: Brown finds that with three cooking methods, you can cook just about any seafood.

programme.title: Good Eats: Power to the Pilaf
programme.desc: Alton Brown rewrites the rules for the most versatile of all rice dishes: the pilaf.

programme.title: Good Eats: It's A Wonderful Cake
programme.desc: Alton Brown is out to prove that fruitcake shouldn't be the butt of holiday jokes anymore.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Meat

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Global Grub
programme.desc: Roger Mooking takes 15 gastronomical trips for the most exotic, flavourful and spicy foods all without leaving the U.S. The featured chefs create classic international meals from Ethiopia, Thailand, Mexico and more in their own American kitchens.

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Master Devolos!
Beyblade Burst Rise: Ultimate Creation! Eclipse Genesis!
Polaris: Player Select: Pigeon Vision
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Movie: Mob Town

programme.title: Movie: The Girl With the Dragon Tattoo

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon A Time...In Hollywood

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys For Life

programme.title: Movie: Adventureland

programme.title: Movie: Buttons: A Christmas Tale

programme.title: Movie: A Dog's Way Home
